highlights.summary: William Carey University admissions for 2025 are now open. Interested students can apply directly through the official website.

faqs.question: How costly is William Carey University BSc?
faqs.answer:
William Carey University is not that expensive compared to other BSc-offering colleges. The total tuition fee of William Carey University is INR 1.7 Lacs to INR 10.6 Lacs depending upon the type of specialisation chosen. This makes the fee for one semester approximately INR 29,000 to INR 1.7 Lacs depending on the course.
Even for expensive courses, William Carey University offers the facility of paying the semester fee in two instalments. Therefore, the BSc fees for each semester are not too costly and candidates have the opportunity to pay the tuition fees in up to 12 instalments.

faqs.question: When will the admission for a BPharm course at William Carey University start?
faqs.answer:
The admissions process for the BPharm course starts in April. Candidates appearing for their Class 12 board exams can apply for admission during that time, provided they complete the eligibility criteria later.
The classes for the BPharm course at William Carey University will start in October and the first semester ends in Feb/March.

faqs.question: Does William Carey University take additional fee from international students for D.Pharma course?
faqs.answer:
Yes, William Carey University takes additional fees from international students applying for DPharma at the institute. The university also takes additional fees from other students that do not come from North-east India.
William Carey University charges an additional fee so that there is more participation of North-east students in the university and they can take benefit of the education and facilities provided by the institute.

faqs.question: Can William Carey University be considered a good university?
faqs.answer: William Carey University is one of the eminnet univeristy and has a unique institution committed primarily to higher education where the academy integrates with the socio-economic and environmental realities to bring about a total transformation of people and their contexts. It is a UGC (University Grants Commission) recognised university and approved by PCI. The university is a member of the Association of Indian Universities. During,  William Carey University placements the highest and average package is INR 15 LPA and INR 4 LPA.

college_info.intro:
WCU has 7 departments, including Technology, Life Science, Physical Science, Social Science, etc. The affiliated colleges and departments offer a trange of courses at the UG and PG levels, across various domains. MBA, BTech, and MA are among the most popular programmes offered at the university.
WCU offers a full-time BTech programme at the UG level. The BTech programme offered at the university covers core courses in the areas of Computer Science, Civil Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Information Technology, and others. The MA programme offered by William Carey University is a two-year programme. It is offered in several specialisations, including Rural Development, English, Geography, Sociology, and others.

Further, the average package stood at INR 4 LPA. The top recruiters of WCU are Havells, Chegg, Airtel, Accenture, Tata Steel, Genpact, and others. reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Neutral satisfaction and good.

review_content.Placements: There are only 16 students in my batch. When I was a student of that university there were no hiring companies and internships also. We have to search by our own but there are some students from my seniors batch they get placements through the help of sir and HOD.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructures are not so good I can say because the classrooms are divided by wooden walls. But the university has three blocks i.e., three buildings and I think block 1 and block 3 are rented. But I am not really sure and there are no hostel provided by the university. But there are some private hostels near the university.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.Sc. in Physics - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Discipline is very important in this college.

review_content.Placements: A lot of companies visit to campus for placements and students are eligible to sit for it in their final or pre-final semester of the course. Companies like Akash byju, Chegg, havells, Zigram, Physics Wallah have visited the campus for placements for various post like research assistant, business analyst, project manager, and subject matter expert, etc. The highest package was around 15Lpa for the post of data scientist and average packages were more than 4lpa for the profiles like research assistant and subject matter expert. The placement ratio is not that bad as in my class 15-20 out of 55 got placed with decent salary packages. If you are really good with your subject knowledge and skilled enough, it is not that hard to get placed in it. As I have mentioned earlier I want to join FSSAI as a junior food analyst. FSSAI is my dream workplace and hopefully, I'm on my way to getting there probably soon.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.Sc. in Physics - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Our college provides very good environment for students.

review_content.Placements: Many companies visited our campus for placements. Students were eligible to sit for placements in their final or pre-final semester. The recruiting companies were Akash, Byjus, Havells, Jigram, and Physics Wallah. These companies visited our campus to offer placement for various roles like research assistant, business analyst, project manager, subject matter expert, etc. The highest salary package offered for the role of data scientist was 15 LPA and the average salary package was more than 4 LPA for the roles of research assistant and subject matter expert. Placement ratio is good as 15 to 20 students out of 55 got placed with good salary packages. Students good at the subjects and have enough skills will easily get placements in companies. I want to join FSSAI as a junior food analyst. FSSAI is my dream workplace and I'm on my way to get there soon.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.A. in Economics - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: It is the best college for students.

review_content.Placements: Placements were very good. Top recruiting companies were TCS, Amazon, Flipkart, and Mahindra. Almost 80% of students got placed in this course. The average salary package offered was 22 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of this college was better. Hostels were very good. All facilities were decent. The food served in the mess was very good. They provided food thrice a day.
review_content.Faculty: The course curriculum was relevant. Teachers were well-experienced and highly qualified. Few of them were Ph.D. scholars. The teaching quality was better. If we studied properly then we would score good marks.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Chemistry - Batch of 2017
reviews_list.review_title: It is a good university with such an affordable fee. It helps you in all-round development.

review_content.Placements: As there are no placements in our college for B.Sc graduates, but our college provides you with internships and an opportunity for practical work and help you in all-around development. Our college also helps you to have exposure to practical knowledge during your graduation course.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is really good, but only the hostel facility is not available. There are pretty good classrooms, labs and library with all the required equipment and books. Sports are played in our college. All other necessary facilities are available on our campus.

course_faqs.question: How is William Carey University to pursue B.Pharma?
course_faqs.answer: BPharm at William Carey University is offered as a full-time Diploma in offline mode. This means candidates must devote certain hours to the course every week, and all classes will take place at the university campus in Shillong.William Carey University does not have a provision for doing BPharm through online or part-time modes. Therefore, working professionals would not be able to do this programme as the course needs a commitment of hours to be spent in the university campus.

William Carey University feesincludes components such as tuition fee, security deposit, hostel fee, mess fee, etc. Aspirants need to pay the fee annually or semester-wise. William Carey University admissions are currently open. Candidates can get admission in both online or offline mode. Below are the steps to get a seat in William Carey University:
Step 1: WCU Application Process 2025

Aspirants can register online on the official website of the university or collect the form from the campus. After registration, aspirants need to fill out the admission form and pay INR 100 for final submission of the application. Aspirants can also send the form with an application fee of INR 200 via postal services.
Step 2: Selection

Once registration is over, the university evaluates the applications of the candidates. WCU considers the merit of the aspirants in the qualifying exam for admission. The university intimate the selected applicants by email or telephone along with the admission reciept or token.
Step 3: Admission Confirmation

Selected applicants need to complete the admission process by making the payment of first semester fee either at the university office or via any of the online payment gateway. Applicants must complete the admission process within the 10 days after receiving the admission confirmation mail.

faqs.question: Can students join William Carey University directly without any entrance exam?
faqs.answer: Candidates do not require entrance exam score to get admission in William Carey University. Admission to all the UG and PG courses is based on merit in the last qualifying exam. For PhD, the university conducts an entrance exam for shortlisting candidates.

faqs.question: Are admissions at William Carey University entrance-based or merit-based?
faqs.answer: William Carey University admissions are merit-based for all UG and PG courses. The university considers the scores of the candidates in the last qualifying exam for admission. The university conducts an entrance exam only for selecting candidates for PhD programme. Aspirants need to confirm their seat in the university by paying the course fee at the time of admissions.

faqs.question: When will the admission for a BPharm course at William Carey University start?
faqs.answer: The admissions process for the BPharm course starts in April. Candidates appearing for their Class 12 board exams can apply for admission during that time, provided they complete the eligibility criteria later.The classes for the BPharm course at William Carey University will start in October and the first semester ends in Feb/March.

placement_report.college_name: William Carey University Shillong Placement & Salary Insights

placement_data.title: William Carey University Shillong Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: William Carey University placement statistics are not out yet. As per the Shiksha students' reviews, the highest package offered in recent years was INR 15 LPA . Further, the average package stood at INR 4 LPA . Havells, Chegg, and many other renowned companies participated in William Carey University placements over the past few years.

faqs.question: Does William Carey University have good placements?
faqs.answer: William Carrey University is a private institution established in 1892 in Meghalaya, Shillong. This university in Shillong was established in 2005 by the Government of Meghalaya and named after William Carey, a renowned English Baptist missionary. It is recognised by the University Grants Commission (UGC) and accredited by the All India Council for Technical Education (AICTE). The placement of this college has done an excellent job in placing more that 50% of its students every year. Companies like Akash, Byju, Chegg, Havells, Zigram, Physics Wallah, TCS, Amazon, Flipkart, and Mahindra have visited the campus for placements for various posts like research assistant, business analyst, project manager, and subject matter expert. The highest package offered till date has been around 15 Lpa for the post of data scientist and average packages were more than 4 LPA for the profiles like research assistant and subject matter expert. So with WCU you will be in safe hands in terms of excelling and succeeding in your career. At WCU you will be able to work in your dream company.

faqs.question: How are BSc placements at William Carey University?
faqs.answer: The placement cell of William Carey University is fantastic. They train students and invite companies to recruit them. With that the college has achieved a marvelous placement track record over the past several years. Companies like Akash, Byju, Chegg, Havells, Zigram, Physics Wallah, TCS, Amazon, Flipkart, and Mahindra visit the campus for placements. These companies recruit students for various posts like research assistant, business analyst, project manager, and subject matter expert. The highest package offered till date has been around 15 Lpa for the post of data scientist and average packages were more than 4 LPA for the profiles like research assistant and subject matter expert. The institution also provides you with internships and an opportunity for practical work and help you in all-around development. Our college also helps you to have exposure to practical knowledge during your graduation course. You can rest assured knowing that your time in William Carey University will be worth every thing given the mission and vision the college has for all of its students.

faqs.question: Are government jobs offered to BA graduates from William Carey University?
faqs.answer: William Carey University BA graduates can apply for government jobs in their field or another field. For most government jobs, graduation from UGC-approved colleges and William Carey University has UGC approval along with AICTE & PCI. A graduation degree also makes candidates eligible for higher studies, which can help them secure government jobs in teaching, research, and manufacturing. Alumni from the institution have applied and been selected as IPS officers in the state and other parts of the country.

faqs.question: What companies come to William Carey University for placements?
faqs.answer: Top companies from around the world like Mercedes, Toyota, Hyundai, and many more come in for placements at William Carey University. According to IIRF Rankings, in 2023 companies like FSSAI, Chegg, and Havells were the top recruiters during placements. According to Shiksha student reviews, the highest package offered for placements in 2023 was INR 15 LPA and the average package of placements in the university was INR 4 LPA. Though, there is not much information regarding placements in the university before that to compare it with the average salary garnered during placements in the university.

reviews.review_heading: Neutral satisfaction and good.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructures are not so good I can say because the classrooms are divided by wooden walls. But the university has three blocks i.e., three buildings and I think block 1 and block 3 are rented. But I am not really sure and there are no hostel provided by the university. But there are some private hostels near the university.

reviews.review_heading: Discipline is very important in this college.
reviews.review_text: The college provides the hostel facility for the student and the students have to pay for it. The feels are different for every type of room. If the student wants a single-seated room, double-seated room, three or four-seated room more than four-side room then he or she has to pay according to that.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides very good environment for students.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facilities were good with a gym table, tennis table, and badminton court in every hostel. Hostels were well furnished that provided water and electricity facilities. Food quality was average and the menu changed regularly and the dessert provided was good. During the registration process, students can select whether they need a hostel or not. Hostels were affordable at a fee of Rs.1,500 per semester and Rs.3,000 for mess per month.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college for students.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this college was better. Hostels were very good. All facilities were decent. The food served in the mess was very good. They provided food thrice a day.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good university with such an affordable fee. It helps you in all-round development.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is really good, but only the hostel facility is not available. There are pretty good classrooms, labs and library with all the required equipment and books. Sports are played in our college. All other necessary facilities are available on our campus.

reviews_list.review_title: Knowledgeable faculty with decent placements and good facilities .

review_content.Placements: Around 70% of students in our batch got placements with packages ranging from 4 LPA to 9 LPA, averaging 6.5 LPA. Top recruiters included L&T, Shapoorji Palloni, and TCE. About 50% of students got internships. The top roles offered were structural engineers and project managers.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities at PSR are pretty good. The Wi-Fi is reliable, and the labs and classrooms are well equipped. The library has decent resources. The hostel is comfortable; though the mess food is average, the canteen is better. Medical facilities are basic, and sports facilities are adequate for casual games.

reviews_list.review_title: This college is the best college.

The highest package is 29 Lacs, the average package of this college is 6.5 Lacs, and the lowest package is 4 Lacs. Top MNC companies come to this college like Amazon, TCS, Accenture, Tata, Flipkart, etc. They offer lots of opportunities; almost all the students got opportunities.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is very good. High-speed Wi-Fi is available throughout the college. The labs are fully advanced, all the equipment is available, and the classrooms are fully digital and advanced. The library is also very good; all books are available and it is a good place for studying. The hostel is very good, and they provide good food.

content.Placements: Around 70% of students in our batch got placements with packages ranging from 4 LPA to 9 LPA, averaging 6.5 LPA. Top recruiters included L&T, Shapoorji Palloni, and TCE. About 50% of students got internships. The top roles offered were structural engineers and project managers.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities at PSR are pretty good. The Wi-Fi is reliable, and the labs and classrooms are well equipped. The library has decent resources. The hostel is comfortable; though the mess food is average, the canteen is better. Medical facilities are basic, and sports facilities are adequate for casual games.

individual_reviews.course: M.Tech. in Structural Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: This college is the best college.

content.Placements: The college placement is very good; almost 99 percent got placement. The highest package is 29 Lacs, the average package of this college is 6.5 Lacs, and the lowest package is 4 Lacs. Top MNC companies come to this college like Amazon, TCS, Accenture, Tata, Flipkart, etc. They offer lots of opportunities; almost all the students got opportunities.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is very good. High-speed Wi-Fi is available throughout the college. The labs are fully advanced, all the equipment is available, and the classrooms are fully digital and advanced. The library is also very good; all books are available and it is a good place for studying. The hostel is very good, and they provide good food.

individual_reviews.course: M.Tech. in Structural Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Good college for students who want to learn.

content.Placements: About 70 percent have been placed in our college with the highest package of about 10 LPA, the lowest package is about 5 LPA, and average is about 7 LPA to 8 LPA in companies like FAQs, Cisco, etc. 80 percent have gotten internships.
content.Infrastructure: Our college hostel is average, and food facilities is not so good In mess and in canteen, we get all the things we want. Our college provides us good and best libraries in which all the books are, and they give us free Wi-Fi in college and hostel .

reviews.review_heading: Knowledgeable faculty with decent placements and good facilities .

reviews.review_heading: This college is the best college.

The library is also very good; all books are available and it is a good place for studying. The hostel is very good, and they provide good food.

reviews.review_text:
Our college hostel is average, and food facilities is not so good In mess and in canteen, we get all the things we want. Our college provides us good and best libraries in which all the books are, and they give us free Wi-Fi in college and hostel
.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements and infrastructure are good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is not very modern and new. We have an old building for our course which has non-working fans; it's too hot. The labs are large, but some computers are old and not updated. The facilities in our hostel are limited, with only 8 hours of electricity.

reviews.review_heading: Good for poor students in this college.
reviews.review_text: My college provides the average course materials and books that our students need to gain the knowledge to improve their skills (ex. Wi-Fi, labs, libraries, gyms, etc.). The hostel is the average facility to improve our college food, which is available in the canteen, and medical facilities are also available.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is excellent. Classrooms are well-maintained. Around 100 students can be accommodated easily in each classroom. Our campus is Wi-Fi enabled. Hostel facilities are very good.

reviews.review_heading: All basic facilities is provided by college to students.
reviews.review_text: This is one of most main thing to review. In my college, hostel fee is quite high in the time of 2004 - 2008. Near 30 k per annum. There are two hostels for boys. Each hostel have 130 to 150 rooms. For each room 3 students. So 500 to 600 students will be in one hostel. Hostel rooms are okay but foods are not that much better. Some days it will good. Simply 30% good 30% average 40% bad.

reviews.review_heading: Just an unlucky person to join this college.
reviews.review_text: Average infrastructure style of the college. 4 labs and one library and 5-6 classrooms are available. Hostel is the worst like government hostels and food is not good. One of the worst food is served and lot of sports facilities are there like gym, indoor stadium and average of medical facilities.

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the best engineering colleges.
reviews.review_text: It is the best college for its infrastructure. More laboratories were available. The campus was fully Wi-Fi enabled and had CCTV cameras. The library was available. The hostel was clean and served hygienic food. The canteen served a good variety of food items. Many sports grounds were available.

reviews.review_heading: Review of P S R Engineering College.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available. Labs are good. The classrooms are good. The library is good. But the quality of food in the canteen is the worst. Food quality in the mess is not much good. Same food items are provided in the hostel as well as in the canteen.

reviews.review_heading: It has good infrastructure and some good staff members.
reviews.review_text: Our college has Wi-Fi. There is a central library, and every department has an individual library. It has a 24x7 water supply. The hostel food is normal, but the water facilities are good. The food served in the canteen is at a low price, and the taste of the food is good. The fee is low.

reviews.review_heading: This is a good college for students who have financial problems.
reviews.review_text: Our college has good infrastructure and high-tech laboratories facility. Gym facility is also provided. The hostel food served is not good, but canteen is good and with cheap rate food with high quality. Our college has to take some courses for students so that they get placed in MNC.

reviews.review_heading: I recommend students to join this college.
reviews.review_text: The library is very good. There is no Wi-Fi facility for students. The canteen facilities are good but not healthy. Sports events are not conducted, and no games are conducted. Medical facilities are not available inside the campus. Overall, the college is average.

college_info.college_name: Satya Institute of Technology and Management: Courses, Fees, Admission 2026, Reviews, Info

highlights.summary: Here are some additional updates regarding the Satya Institute of Technology and Management:

college_info.intro:
The flagship programme at Satya Institute of Technology and Management is its BE/BTech programme which spans a duration of 4 years or 8 semesters. The course is extended under 6 different specialisations of Civil Engineering, Electrical & Electronics Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Computer Science & Engineering, and CSE - Artificial Intelligence & Data Science.
The total seat intake for the course is 360 divided across the 6 specialisations/branches with admissions depending on AP EAMCET entrance exam. Students can also apply for Direct or Management quota admissions which accounts for 30% of seats and depends on EAMCET rank. The course fee for BTech is INR 45,600 per annum not including any miscellaneous or extra charges. Candidates can take a look below at the Satya Institute of Technology and Management popular programmes below:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: currently offers a range of courses at UG, PG and Diploma levels. Students can choose from among offline programmes in streams such as Engineering and Business & Management Studies. At the UG level, students can choose the available programmes such as BE / BTech, BCA and BBA. Talking about PG level, some of the available courses include ME/MTech, MBA/PGDM and MCA. The college also offers Diploma courses in Mobile Communication, Automobile Servicing and Computer Science.

faqs.answer: A:    For the admission to MCA course, Satya Institute of Technology and Management cutoff 2024 had been released its cutoff. As per the Satya Institute of Technology and Management APICET cutoff 2024, the MCA specialisation cutoff for the General Home State category was 11931. Candidates can check out the year-wise APICET cutoff for General HS quota:Master of Computer Applications (MCA) - Satya Institute of Technology and Management : APICET Closing Rank Cutoff (General-Home State)Section2024Overall11931
faqs.question: What is the cut off of Satya Institute of Technology and Management?

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, Satya Institute of Technology and Management offers direct admission to BBA. Candidates looking for admission to BBA must fill out the basic eligibility criteria i.e., pass Class 10 and Class 12 from a recognised board. The college offers admission based on the last qualifying exam. After filling out the admission candidates must apply by visiting the official website of the college.
faqs.question: Can I get direct admission to Satya Institute of Technology and Management for BBA without any entrance exam?

faqs.answer: A:    Candidates are required to pass Class 10 and Class 12 with PCM with 50% to apply for Satya Institute of Technology and Management. Additionaly, candidates are required to apply and appear for Andhra Pradesh EAMCET to get admission. After completing the eligibility and selection criteria candidates must fill out the online application form by visiting the official website of the college.
faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for BTech at Satya Institute of Technology and Management?

faqs.answer: A:    In addition to UG and PG courses, Satya Institute of Technology and Management (SITAM) also offers a number of Diploma courses. These programs are designed to provide students with specialised skills in a particular field. The college provides various Diploma such as Diploma in Mobile Communication, Diploma in Automobile Servicing and Diploma in Computer Science.
faqs.question: Does Satya Institute of Technology and Management offer certificate or diploma programmes?

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in CSE (Artificial Intelligence and Data Science) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: I am somewhat satisfied because I got a placement. There is no further improvement in that job.

review_content.Placements: Above 50% of students got placed in my course. The highest package offered is based on the experience, but the lowest package is 5 LPA. A lot of companies like IBM, Netflix, Concentrix, and Wipro hire students. 60% of students got internships in companies like SmartInternz and Oasis Infobyte. Top roles offered are data science, data analytics, AIML engineer, prompt engineer, and generative AI engineer.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms, labs, and the library are good. There is no Wi-Fi. It is decent in the maintenance of the hostel and canteen. Medical facilities are available, and they will be managed by our college CSO. Our college has a huge group, and it can be helpful for playing all types of games like cricket, volleyball, etc.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: SITAM college is very good and it gives 100% placements to all students.

review_content.Placements: There are a lot of students who are placed in the top MNCs. Students life is well-settled now. The minimum salary of students is Rs. 25,000 per month. So students get settled in their life. SITAM is best college for students.
review_content.Faculty: Faculty members are very good at teaching skills and they share a lot of information with students. Faculty members are also well-educated. They don't do any partiality between students, they treat students well and they are friendly. A BBA student is the district's topper from SITAM College. Students can change themselves in this college, even a failure can also be a topper. The students from this college won't fail, at least, they attempt exams and pass. So, SITAM is the best.

faqs.question: Q: Which courses are available at Satya Institute of Technology and Management for students?

faqs.answer: The Satya Institute of Technology and Management course admissions for BTech, M.Tech or MCA depends on Andhra Pradesh EAMCET, Andhra Pradesh PGECET and ICET, respectively. Students must appear for these entrance exams and choose SITAM as their college preference. As such the release of application forms coincides with the important dates for these 3 exams.
faqs.question: Q: When are Satya Institute of Technology and Management application forms out?

faqs.answer: The application fees for Satya Institute of Technology and Management courses depends on the required entrance exam and counselling process, for example:BTech admissions depends on Andhra Pradesh EAMCET with an application fee of INR 600 (INR 500 SC/ST and INR 550 OBC) while the counselling process fees are INR 1200 (INR 600 SC/ST).MTech admissions depends on Andhra Pradesh PGECET with an application fee of INR 1200 (INR 700 SC/ST and INR 900 OBC) while the counselling process fees are INR 1000 (INR 500 SC/ST).MCA admissions depends on Andhra Pradesh ICET with an application fee of INR 550 while the counselling process fees are INR 1200 (INR 600 SC/ST/PH).

admission_overview.college_name: Satya Institute of Technology and Management Admission 2026: Courses, Eligibility, Selection and Application

admission_overview.title: SITAM Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: Satya Institute of Technology and Management admission 2026 is both merit and entrance-based. The college offers various courses at the UG, PG and After 10th levels in various fields, including Engineering, Business and Management Studies and IT and Software, etc. The mode of study for the offered courses is full time. The institute accepts exams, such as JEE Main, GATE, and AP EAMCET, for admission to some specific Satya Institute of Technology and Management courses. For certain programmes, the college considers the merit of the last qualifying exam of candidates, ensuring a comprehensive approach to admissions. Read more details around Satya Institute of Technology and Management admission in the following article.

eligibility_selection.title: SITAM Eligibility and Selection 2026

hostel.description: Separate hostel facility is provided for boys and girls.

Spacious digital library through which we can access online journals

hostel.description: Separate hostel facility is provided for boys and girls.

reviews.review_heading: Excellent college for students.
reviews.review_text: World-class classrooms, good infrastructure, excellent labs.

reviews.review_heading: It has good faculty, good infrastructure, and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a Wi-Fi-enabled campus with smart classrooms, well-equipped labs, and a vast library. Medical aid is available. There are sports facilities that include fields and courts for outdoor and indoor games, supporting holistic growth. Regular cleaning and maintenance ensure a clean environment.

reviews.review_heading: I am somewhat satisfied because I got a placement. There is no further improvement in that job.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms, labs, and the library are good. There is no Wi-Fi. It is decent in the maintenance of the hostel and canteen. Medical facilities are available, and they will be managed by our college CSO. Our college has a huge group, and it can be helpful for playing all types of games like cricket, volleyball, etc.

reviews.review_heading: SITAM college is very good and it gives 100% placements to all students.
reviews.review_text: There are a lot of students who are placed in the top MNCs. Students life is well-settled now. The minimum salary of students is Rs. 25,000 per month. So students get settled in their life. SITAM is best college for students.

reviews.review_heading: Satya Institute of Technology and Management review.
reviews.review_text: The college has a great library, with minimal but adequate facilities. There are two libraries, one central and the other digital. We can really enjoy and learn a lot in the library, but come to study, not for enjoyment.

reviews.review_heading: SITAM- Average EAMCET College.
reviews.review_text: SITAM College provides facilities like a library and Wi-Fi to every branch. But the library is very old; no new books were added recently. Wi-Fi is only available in labs. Students cannot use free Wi-Fi. Classrooms are comfortable. The hostel's facilities are comfortable and hygienic. Room maintenance is very clean. Mess facilities are tasty sometimes, but repeated dishes are served. The canteen is also available on college premises. Medical facilities like ambulances and first aid are available...

reviews.review_heading: Review of Satya Institute of Technology and Management.
reviews.review_text: In these departments are good facility, there are good experienced teachers, excellent wonderful teaching, students can simply understand. Every department has a reliable Wi-Fi connection; all labs are well-equipped, good library, in the library Wi-Fi & each and every book in the library. Spot sits & low-cost prices in canteen.

reviews.review_heading: Everything is good but keep your expectations in check.
reviews.review_text:
- Good in teaching skills 
- Being gentle and friendly
Were the teachers helpful, qualified, and knowledgeable. Teaching quality is good
Here we make the students industry-ready
Hostel is good Food and Good in pleasant environment
Good in taking care by warden.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Satya Institute of Technology and Management.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides excellent infrastructure and facilities. Wi-Fi, labs, and a digital library are available. Classrooms and hostel rooms are good. The quality of the food is not good.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Our college atmosphere was very good. Our campus was greenery all around. The playground was available in our college. Hostels were better. Around 4 students can be accommodated easily in each hostel room. Every day, the menu was changed. The library was available in our college. It had several books.

reviews.review_heading: Choose this college only if you want a B.Tech degree and you can't join a better College .
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is not up to the mark. Wi-Fi is provided but it gives limited data of 35mb per day which is too low to use. Maintenance of the hostel is so bad that students tend to stay in PG after the completion of 1st year. Games are rarely conducted.

reviews.review_heading: Before 2017, there were placements but now the situation is not good.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available but not for accessing for long time. Classroom teachers are not available. Very less teachers are there but the library is okay. Hostel is also not good but canteen is okay. Quality of services is not much good.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied because of our college environment and good placements.
reviews.review_text: We have a library, a hostel, a canteen, and advanced classrooms with projectors. The hostel facilities are awesome, and food is the main thing that we have to talk about. There is a large playground to play various games like cricket, volleyball, football, etc. NCC and NSS programs are conducted on campus.

reviews.review_heading: My college was good in infrastructure and education .
reviews.review_text: In sitam engineering college the labs are very good. Especially the communicative English  lab is very nice. And also the computer labs are very good. Library and hostel is very nice. The food at canteen is hygienic and at the reasonable prices. The play ground is also very nice.

reviews.review_heading: The college is good for average students.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are good. The faculty members are good. The library has many books, and we are also allowed to take books to our home. The college offers NCC for girls as well. The college culture is good. Computer labs are good. The canteen is okay. Food quality is okay.

review_summary.college_name: Puranmal Lahoti Government Polytechnic College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: This is the best college for those who actually want to be an engineer.

content.Placements: The placement of the college is not that much good but it is satisfactory as a Diploma degree. The number of students who take placement through the college is not that much as compared to the engineering college. Maximum students like to do B.E. or B.Tech degrees than placement. But the college tries to give 100% placement for needy students.
content.Infrastructure: As compared to the feel of the college, the infrastructure is excellent. This college has a separate building for each branch. The area of the college is very big. The college has a very nice library. The hostel of the college is free of cost. It requires only the mess fees monthly. The hostel doesn't allow girls to go out after 7 PM. The hostel environment is very good. Ragging is not allowed inside the hostel and college.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: PLGPL 2021-24 cherished good memories and helped to find out winning skills.

content.Placements: About 60% of students were placed in this course. The highest package is 2.4 Lacs, and the lowest package is 1.5 Lacs. Recruiting companies are John Deere, Vitesco Technologies, Bajaj, etc. Not the internship, but apprenticeship by Vitesco Technologies. Roles offered in this course are Machine Operator, Firewall Associate.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities offered by the department are quite good, but the hostel didn't supply many facilities. There is no hygiene in the hostel in terms of food in the mess. Lack of nutrition and hygiene have always been a matter of concern in the hostel mess. Despite this, the course was good at providing medical facilities, sports, and games.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Information Technology - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Good faculty, infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: I completed my Diploma in IT from PLGPL. All students from my batch are passed with good percentage. Companies like L&T, IBM, Infosys etc. offer recruitment for this course. 10-20% students get internships from this course which is provided by these companies.
content.Infrastructure: This college have good infrastructures and classrooms. It also has Labs which is well maintained. IT depth also probides wi-fi facility to students. Library is common to all students. This college has it's own girls & boys hostels. Hostel is well maintained. It provides facilities like medical & games. Food quality provided by hostel is also good.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Civil Engineering (Second Shift) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Best college for civil engineering.

content.Placements: The basic cutoff in the US college system is: 1. for general above 80; 2. for OBC 75. 3. For SC/St above 60, the vjnt is about 55. The highest package is usually between INR 1 and 3 lacs per year. There are many companies available, like Sidko, Mahad, etc. Generally, the site engineer post is offered.
content.Infrastructure: There are many facilities available, such as a library, hostel, labs, computer labs, classrooms, and six branches. The quality of various things in lahoti is awesome, like the food in the mess, whose qualities are the best, and also the canteen available in college.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Civil Engineering (Second Shift) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Our college provides good professors.

content.Placements: Many top recruiting companies like L&T, etc., visit our college to hire students. It is a very good college for students.
content.Infrastructure: Laboratory is well-maintained. Classrooms are spacious and equipment is costly in our college. Drawing hall is huge in our college. Computer laboratory, hydraulic laboratory, geotechnical laboratory, applied mechanics laboratory, and survey laboratory are available. The hostel facilities are good. Mess facility is better. Sports and games are also conducted in this college.

faqs.question: What can students do after JEE Main session 2 result?
faqs.answer: After JEE session 2 is completed, only those candidates who are aiming for IITs need to start preparing for JEE Advanced after clearing JEE Main. Those who are above the 98th percentile should start preparing for JEE Advanced as soon as possible. Those below this, between the 95th and 98th percentile, should focus on attempting more mock tests and previous year question papers so that they have a better chance of clearing JEE Advanced

highlights.summary: Here are some additional updates regarding the Dr. Babasaheb Ambedkar College of Engineering and Research:

faqs.answer: A:    Dr. Babasaheb Ambedkar College of Engineering and Research has been rated 3.4 on placements on the basis of 40 reviews done by students.
faqs.question: How is the placement facility at Dr. Babasaheb Ambedkar College of Engineering and Research?

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Dr. Babasaheb Ambedkar College of Engineering and Research is an institute which offers various courses at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time programmes from stream such as Engineering. At the UG level, students can choose the available programmes such as B.E. / B.Tech. Talking about PG level, some of the available courses include M.E./M.Tech. The fee structure for the Dr. Babasaheb Ambedkar College of Engineering and Research programmes is around INR 1,24,426 to 3,60,000.

faqs.answer:
A:    Dr. Babasaheb Ambedkar College of Engineering and Research has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate who have passed Diploma in Engineering & Technology & obtained at least 45% marks (40% marks for Backward class, EWS & PWD candidates belonging to Maharashtra State only) can also apply.M.E./M.TechCandidate must have completed Bachelor Degree in the relevant field from AICTE or Central or State Government approved institutions or equivalent, with above mentioned marks (at least 45% marks in case of candidates of Backward class categories and persons with disability belonging to Maharashtra State only).
For sponsored candidates, candidate must have minimum of two years of fulltime work experience in a registered firm/ company/industry/ educational and/ or research institute/ any Government Department or Government Autonomous Organization in the relevant field in which admission is being sought.
faqs.question: What is the eligibility to get admission in Dr. Babasaheb Ambedkar College of Engineering and Research for UG/PG courses?

faqs.answer: A:    Dr. Babasaheb Ambedkar College of Engineering and Research has courses such as B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech which are primarily in the stream of Engineering. Dr. Babasaheb Ambedkar College of Engineering and Research has specializations such as B.Tech specializations in Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, M.E./M.Tech specializations in Computer Science Engineering.
faqs.question: Which courses are offered by Dr. Babasaheb Ambedkar College of Engineering and Research?

faqs.answer: A:    Courses offerred by Dr. Babasaheb Ambedkar College of Engineering and Research are approved by eminent Government bodies like AICTE. The combined seats available for courses offered at Dr. Babasaheb Ambedkar College of Engineering and Research goes up to 420.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: Placements in 2018 were good as 80% of the students got placed.

review_content.Placements: In the CSE branch, 80% of the students got placed from the 2018 batch. There are 7 branches, and all branches students got placed in our college. I suggest this college to take admission.
review_content.Infrastructure: All facilities are available. Lunch, breakfast and dinner are good, and healthy food is available. The library is available, and up-to-date books are available. Everything is good, and the infrastructure is very good in this college.
review_content.Faculty: Teaching quality is high. All teachers are helpful and ready to teach all-time. It is an amazing college. All teachers are PhD holders, so I like this college. All students are very up-to-date about their branch and are ready to get placed. Practical knowledge is provided. Staff members are excellent and well-knowledgeable.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2015
reviews_list.review_title: Wi-Fi enabled campus with good connectivity. Faculty is co-operative and friendly.

review_content.Placements: Almost 97% of the students from our courses are placed. In our course the lowest salary package offered is 4.2 Lacs per year. The highest was 6.4 Lacs. Top recruiting companies are Amazon, Flipkart, Lenskart, Infosys, TCS, Google. Top roles offered to the students are Manager and Head Manager. Almost everyone got internship.
review_content.Infrastructure: We have personalized block for business, a personalized library and full Wi-Fi campus with good internet connectivity, terrace, and good canteen with the best chef. We have personalized hospital at premises. All the sports are available at college premises like tennis, cricket, football etc.

review_summary.college_name: Dr. Babasaheb Ambedkar College of Engineering and Research Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Our college is a good college.

content.Placements: Around 2 to 3 students were placed. The highest salary package is 4 LPA, the lowest salary package is 2 LPA in mechanical engineering and the average salary package is 3 LPA. There is no top recruiting company. Around 50% of internships are offered.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure are good with a Wi-Fi facility. Library is also available. Hostel is good. The quality of food is also good. Sports and games are also good.
content.Faculty: Teachers are helpful and teach more knowledge about their subjects. Their teaching ability is much stronger. Semester exams are very tough. The pass percentage is 60%.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Our college has a moderate infrastructure.

content.Placements: Only 10% of the recruitment agencies visit the campus. The highest salary package offered was 2.5 LPA. From 10%-80% of the students got placed through open campus. Almost 50% of the students got internships in thermal power plants and Electric Loco Motor Shade. They also provide free placement coaching for 1 month before 4th year.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities provided were not adequate. We had poor water management and poor Wi-Fi facilities, only 10 MB was given in the entire day. Classrooms condition was average. Library facilities were good & they provided books for a maximum period during the whole semester. There was neither a hostel nor mess facility.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Placements in 2018 were good as 80% of the students got placed.

content.Placements: In the CSE branch, 80% of the students got placed from the 2018 batch. There are 7 branches, and all branches students got placed in our college. I suggest this college to take admission.
content.Infrastructure: All facilities are available. Lunch, breakfast and dinner are good, and healthy food is available. The library is available, and up-to-date books are available. Everything is good, and the infrastructure is very good in this college.
content.Faculty: Teaching quality is high. All teachers are helpful and ready to teach all-time. It is an amazing college. All teachers are PhD holders, so I like this college. All students are very up-to-date about their branch and are ready to get placed. Practical knowledge is provided. Staff members are excellent and well-knowledgeable.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2015
individual_reviews.title: Wi-Fi enabled campus with good connectivity. Faculty is co-operative and friendly.

content.Placements: Almost 97% of the students from our courses are placed. In our course the lowest salary package offered is 4.2 Lacs per year. The highest was 6.4 Lacs. Top recruiting companies are Amazon, Flipkart, Lenskart, Infosys, TCS, Google. Top roles offered to the students are Manager and Head Manager. Almost everyone got internship.
content.Infrastructure: We have personalized block for business, a personalized library and full Wi-Fi campus with good internet connectivity, terrace, and good canteen with the best chef. We have personalized hospital at premises. All the sports are available at college premises like tennis, cricket, football etc.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Best teaching faculty in Nagpur, good management services provided to students, good ambience.

content.Placements: 1- 40% students get placed amongst eligible candidates. 2- 9 Lacs per annum is the highest salary offered in the year 2018. 3- TCS, Wipro, Accenture, Amazon, etc. were top recruiting companies. 4- no idea about the top roles offered 5- 3.5 Lacs in an average is the package offered.
content.Infrastructure: 1- Fully equipped labs, well-furnished classrooms. Library service is good, the college provides Wi-Fi in the campus. 2- Sports and games are encouraged in the college. Also, there is a provision of Hostel and mess. Canteen service is getting upgraded and ambience is also good.

Dr. Babasaheb Ambedkar College of Engineering and Research has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate who have passed Diploma in Engineering & Technology & obtained at least 45% marks (40% marks for Backward class, EWS & PWD candidates belonging to Maharashtra State only) can also apply.M.E./M.TechCandidate must have completed Bachelor Degree in the relevant field from AICTE or Central or State Government approved institutions or equivalent, with above mentioned marks (at least 45% marks in case of candidates of Backward class categories and persons with disability belonging to Maharashtra State only).
For sponsored candidates, candidate must have minimum of two years of fulltime work experience in a registered firm/ company/industry/ educational and/ or research institute/ any Government Department or Government Autonomous Organization in the relevant field in which admission is being sought.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is a good college.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are good with a Wi-Fi facility. Library is also available. Hostel is good. The quality of food is also good. Sports and games are also good.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has a moderate infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Facilities provided were not adequate. We had poor water management and poor Wi-Fi facilities, only 10 MB was given in the entire day. Classrooms condition was average. Library facilities were good & they provided books for a maximum period during the whole semester. There was neither a hostel nor mess facility.

reviews.review_heading: Placements in 2018 were good as 80% of the students got placed.
reviews.review_text: All facilities are available. Lunch, breakfast and dinner are good, and healthy food is available. The library is available, and up-to-date books are available. Everything is good, and the infrastructure is very good in this college.

reviews.review_heading: Wi-Fi enabled campus with good connectivity. Faculty is co-operative and friendly.
reviews.review_text: We have personalized block for business, a personalized library and full Wi-Fi campus with good internet connectivity, terrace, and good canteen with the best chef. We have personalized hospital at premises. All the sports are available at college premises like tennis, cricket, football etc.

reviews.review_heading: Best teaching faculty in Nagpur, good management services provided to students, good ambience.
reviews.review_text:
1- Fully equipped labs, well-furnished classrooms. Library service is good, the college provides Wi-Fi in the campus. 
2- Sports and games are encouraged in the college. Also, there is a provision of Hostel and mess. Canteen service is getting upgraded and ambience is also good.

reviews.review_heading: It has the average infrastructure, quality teaching, and moderate placements.
reviews.review_text: The college provides many numbers of facilities. The college provides common room for both boys and girls. Canteen is available. The college provides Wi-Fi facility on each floor of each department. Four streams for engineering are provided in our college, i.e., electrical, mechanical, civil, and computer science engineering. Each has an intake of about 60 students, excluding the mechanical. The mechanical stream has an intake of about 180 students. Quality of food served is good. The hostel is ...

reviews.review_heading: I had good experience at this college during four years of my course. One must take admission here.
reviews.review_text: Our classrooms are good as compared to other colleges. The library has many books, and one can take books from the library and keep the books with them for 1.5 months. The issue date can't be extended during exams. Sports are also given importance, and we get additional marks if we excel in sports. The college also organises a gathering event named Umang which is held during the mid-week of February.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college of Meghe Group.
reviews.review_text: The campus is huge. The parking area is also huge. A spacious canteen is available. The campus is Wi-Fi enabled. A digital library, advanced laboratories, and well-furnished computer labs are available. A separate floor is allotted for each department. Sports ground is large. Security, bank and ATM are available on the campus. The college provides transport facilities. An ambulance is available on the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfactory college for the engineering students.
reviews.review_text: We don't have Wi-Fi in all the areas, but some places do have it. There is a big ground for all sorts of games. The library is good enough to study. The classrooms are good and are well-designed. There is a small canteen to grab a quick bite at all times. The food in the canteen is decent but spicy.

reviews.review_heading: The college is good regarding all aspects. Including staff, library, cultural events, etc.
reviews.review_text: The campus is equipped with CCTV for safety features. The whole campus has a jio Wi-Fi connection that gives access to all of the students. The labs are well-equipped with all the required equipments. Library contains all the major books and can be issued from there. There is a cafeteria provided for students as well as the staff. The overall campus is nature friendly and has got positive vibes and colours. Our college has provided a psychologist counsellor for the help of students.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good infrastructure and good faculty, but it needs to improve the placement record.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of my college is excellent. The facilities provided by my college were very good. Wi-Fi is available in every place on the campus. The classrooms of the college are very good. The library is also good. There are lots of technical and non-technical books available in the library. The sports section of college is also good.

reviews.review_heading: Nice college with good teaching staff available.
reviews.review_text: The labs here are in good condition. Also, the auditorium here is fabulous and as I told placements is very good for those students who want to do a job after their degree completion. Medical facilities are also available here, and the classrooms here are not too good. The teaching staff here are also average.

reviews.review_heading: The college is not that good but can give you a degree.
reviews.review_text: Well, talking about the infrastructure, at our time, it was not good, but now, it became far better. But still, it is not that good because there is no playground. Well, talking about the other things like classes and library, it is good. The laboratory and the other things are good, but not up to the mark.

reviews.review_heading: Good college but don't expect much like NIT or autonomous colleges.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. The good environment of education. The library is also good. The civil building is the main attraction on the campus. The college is situated in Data Meghe group, so the campus is big and well developed with all facilities. There is a hospital, which is also in the college and well-engineered construction for handicapped persons.

reviews.review_heading: The college is good as the teaching quality, placements, and facilities are good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is very impressive and clean. It is an eco-friendly campus. A good surrounding is maintained nearby. The classrooms are well-developed and provided with all the necessary facilities. The Wi-Fi services are provided which is very useful.

highlights.summary:
The KCET 2026 registration window for admission to the BE/BTech course is now closed. The KCET exam 2026 will be held on Apr 23 and Apr 24, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

placements.overview:
Founded in 2002, AIET - Appa Institute of Engineering and Technology is a private institute. It is located in Gulbarga, Karnataka. The institute is accredited with AICTE. AIET - Appa Institute of Engineering and Technology provides UG and PG courses in Full Time mode. It provides 10 courses across specialisations such as Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Mechanical Engineering and Nanotechnology. Some of the courses offered at this institute include B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech and MBA/PGDM. AIET - Appa Institute of Engineering and Technology fees ranges between INR 1,09,000 to 3,86,296. The student intake for these courses is 612. AIET - Appa Institute of Engineering and Technology offers these course across fields such as Engineering and Business & Management Studies. AIET - Appa Institute of Engineering and Technology offers all the campus facilities to students.

AIET - Appa Institute of Engineering and Technology offers a wide range of programmes to students at the UG and PG levels. The college is mainly concerned with streams such as Engineering and Business & Management Studies. At the UG level, the college offers courses such as B.E. / B.Tech. At the PG level, the college offers courses such as M.E./M.Tech and MBA/PGDM. AIET - Appa Institute of Engineering and Technology courses are offered to students in Full Time mode. Further, the fees structure for AIET - Appa Institute of Engineering and Technology courses stands around INR 1,09,000 to 3,86,296.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Very good infrastructure and best faculty at Appa Institute of Engineering and Technology.

review_content.Placements: 89 percent of students were placed in my course. The highest package was 12 lacs per annum, and the lowest package was 1.5 lacs per annum. Altratech and AutoCAD Pro are the recruiting companies. 48 percent of students got placements. Junior engineer and assistant engineer are the top roles offered in my course.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities are Wi-Fi, labs, library and survey lab, AutoCAD lab, and BMT lab. Medical facilities are good, and sports and games are available. indoor games and all outdoor games are available, and the canteen is providing the best and healthiest food to students.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2017
reviews_list.review_title: It has a good study environment, good infrastructure and faculty, but no placements.

review_content.Placements: 60% of students got placed. 45,000 is the fee for a government seat, and 1.25 lacs is the fee for a management seat. L&T, My Home, NCC, etc., come here. No internship is provided because this college is located in a non-metro city, and metro cities are away from this location. Civil site engineer, detailing engineer, estimation engineer, etc., roles are offered.
review_content.Infrastructure: Labs are good and well maintained. There are good faculty to teach students practically. The classrooms are fully furnished with AC facilities and good ventilation. The library is good with a peaceful environment for studies.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Overall, our college is budget friendly for the students who passes the State CET.

review_content.Placements: In my course, there are 178 Students out of 180. There is a high demand for Computer Science in our district. The highest CTC offered is Rs 8 LPA, the average CTC is Rs 6 LPA and the lowest is Rs 3 LPA. Most of the students get internships and most of the companies are a startup.
review_content.Infrastructure: College provides decent facilities to their student. Facilities include facility including clean and tidy classrooms. The college books and assignment notes are also provided by the college. Infrastructure structure is also fine. There is high-speed internet in a lab. The lab is also well maintained and the library is just amazing.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Appa Institute Of Engineering and Technology.

review_content.Placements: Every year, the top MNCs conduct pool campus drives in this college. Companies like Cognizant, Infosys, NTT Data, Wipro etc. The placements are good. The college provides good placement opportunities. Even after graduation, they'll provide placement opportunities to the students.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college is good. The hostel fee is low, and you won't find such a hostel in the entire city. The food quality is good. The hostel has very good facilities. There is no power cut. Wi-Fi is available. The overall food quality is good, and a variety of food is provided.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2015
reviews_list.review_title: Our college has good infrastructure and facilities, but there are no placements.

review_content.Placements: Our college doesn't have its own training and placement office. So, our college should focus more on placements by providing guidance on career planning, job searching and postgraduate studies. Our college didn't invite any core company for placements and invited only a few BPOs. None of the students from our batch got placed in any organisation.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has excellent infrastructure, and it is accessible from various parts of the city. The computer science lab is equipped with multiple terminals and internet facilities for teachers and students. The library is well-stocked, and services offered by the library are circulation, consultation and reference. Separate hostel facilities are provided for boys and girls, and hostels have adequate security and good discipline. Students are provided with all the games and sports facilities. There is also a canteen on the campus, which serves vegetarian food.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: Little bit satisfied because of faculty members but I am disappointed with the placement in 2019.

review_content.Placements: Less than 2% students were placed in our course. 7LPA was the highest, 1.5LPA was the lowest and 3.5 was the average package offered. Infosys was the top recruiting company. 100% students got internship because it was compulsory to complete internship in 8th semester, most of the students did internship in core companies like Birla, Acc ect.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure was all fine, we have good classrooms, labs, library but no Wi-Fi and even we are not allowed to take mobile phones to the college. Some of the areas is under construction, they are constructing new classrooms. The hostel facilities were okay, they provide the food on time.

reviews.review_heading: It has a good study environment, good infrastructure and faculty, but no placements.
reviews.review_text: Labs are good and well maintained. There are good faculty to teach students practically. The classrooms are fully furnished with AC facilities and good ventilation. The library is good with a peaceful environment for studies.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, our college is budget friendly for the students who passes the State CET.
reviews.review_text: College provides decent facilities to their student. Facilities include facility including clean and tidy classrooms. The college books and assignment notes are also provided by the college. Infrastructure structure is also fine. There is high-speed internet in a lab. The lab is also well maintained and the library is just amazing.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Appa Institute Of Engineering and Technology.
reviews.review_text: The college is good. The hostel fee is low, and you won't find such a hostel in the entire city. The food quality is good. The hostel has very good facilities. There is no power cut. Wi-Fi is available. The overall food quality is good, and a variety of food is provided.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good infrastructure and facilities, but there are no placements.
reviews.review_text: Our college has excellent infrastructure, and it is accessible from various parts of the city. The computer science lab is equipped with multiple terminals and internet facilities for teachers and students. The library is well-stocked, and services offered by the library are circulation, consultation and reference. Separate hostel facilities are provided for boys and girls, and hostels have adequate security and good discipline. Students are provided with all the games and sports facilities. The...

reviews.review_heading: Little bit satisfied because of faculty members but I am disappointed with the placement in 2019.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure was all fine, we have good classrooms, labs, library but no Wi-Fi and even we are not allowed to take mobile phones to the college. Some of the areas is under construction, they are constructing new classrooms. The hostel facilities were okay, they provide the food on time.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of faculty, good placement are was in 2017 ,really good infrastructure
reviews.review_text: Computer Science department is good department and labs are good and sir will teach good, classes are also good, no sports and games, Wi-Fi are not available, library is silent and good in our college, our campus is too good. Appa institute of and technology is awesome.

reviews.review_heading: AIET~ Best Engineering College in North Karnataka.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are well-equipped with digital learning technologies. Wi-Fi is available. Good ventilation sir conditioned classrooms. A big library with many textbooks references weekly magazines and many more. The hostel is also well organized with all the basic requirements neatly furnished.

reviews.review_heading: No placements during my study period.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available in the college. Hostel food is not that good. Canteen food is good. There is a playground in the campus and annual sports meet will be taking place every year. Fest will also be organized every year with interesting games and competitions.

reviews.review_heading: Appa Institute Of Engineering and Technology is a gamble choice.
reviews.review_text: The library is huge. Classrooms are decent, but in summer, they become horrible. There are no Wi-Fi facilities. Sports and games are for only two to three days in the entire academic year. Each engineering department has a separate building, and students don't like that environment.

reviews.review_heading: Quite satisfied with the teaching faculty.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college was quite good. Construction was not satisfying. No Wi-Fi facility was available in the mechanical department. Classrooms were good and well ventilated. Labs were average. There was only one library in the whole campus which is not sufficient enough for all the students.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied with the placement activities in 2014.
reviews.review_text: The labs are good, but there is lack of internet as Wi-Fi doesn't work. The classrooms are good as it has A/C facility. The library is good as they provide books throughout the semester for 24/7 to the students. There are no medical and sports facilities.

reviews.review_heading: I'm very proud to say that I'm one of the student of that college.
reviews.review_text: The college campus is good and nice to adapt. The labs, classrooms, and library are air-conditioned. Preference is given to sports and games. The hockey, football, and cricket are the main games played in the college. The canteen food is also good. The hostel rooms are also air-conditioned, and the nice environment is maintained in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: It is a very good institute for engineering.
reviews.review_text: All infrastructure facilities are available. Good labs, classrooms, library and medical facilities are available in the college. The classrooms are air-conditioned. The library facilities are too good. The college provides all the textbooks required for us. Sports and games are encouraged very much.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the good placements. During exams, the library will be opened 24-hours.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are too clean, and AC facility is available. You will get all book rather than getting  2 or 4 books in other colleges. The canteen is good. The hostel rooms are good, and sports facilities are available. The studies were given high importance which is good. The teachers of the college are very helpful.
