college_info.college_name: Dr.Â Annasaheb Shinde College of Agricultural Engineering: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Placements, Reviews

highlights.summary: Here are some additional updates regarding the Dr. Annasaheb Shinde College of Agricultural Engineering:

placements.overview: Dr.Â Annasaheb Shinde College of Agricultural Engineering is a public institute, established in 1969 in Ahmednagar, Maharashtra. Dr.Â Annasaheb Shinde College of Agricultural Engineering is approved by AICTE and offers a total of 2 courses at UG and PG levels in 1 specialisation such as Agriculture & Farm Engineering. Furthermore, it offer courses such as B.E. / B.Tech and M.E./M.Tech in Full Time mode. Dr.Â Annasaheb Shinde College of Agricultural Engineering fee structure includes a total tuition fee is INR 48,000. Dr.Â Annasaheb Shinde College of Agricultural Engineering has an annual seat intake of 77 for all the programmes. It offers courses, in stream such as Engineering. As per the recent Dr.Â Annasaheb Shinde College of Agricultural Engineering placement records, the average median salary at the Institute is around INR 5,17,200. The institute has a safe and well-equipped campus with all the advanced facilities.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Agriculture Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: It is the best agricultural college in Maharashtra, and I am satisfied with our college.

review_content.Placements: The placement scenario is nearly average. More than 40% of the students got placement offers from top recruiting companies of our college like Tech Mahindra, Kubota, Swaraj, John Deere Tractor, etc. More than 50% of the students prepared for government exams, or they opt for masters.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is well-developed. There are well-furnished practical labs for different departments. Classrooms are smart, neat and clean. Free Wi-Fi facility is available with decent speed around the whole campus. The library is huge and filled with all relevant books. Hostel infrastructure is quite good, and the quality of food served in canteens is more than average. There are many playgrounds for different sports, and a gym facility is also available.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Agriculture Engineering - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: I am averagely satisfied with teaching while better satisfied with hostel and college life.

review_content.Placements: About 30% of the students get placement offers from our college from a particular department. Tech Mahindra, John Deere Tractor, Sonalika, Kubota, Swaraj and many other companies offer placements here. About 70% of the students are preparing for competitive exams.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is very well developed and maintained. There are different types of labs for different types of courses and departments. Classrooms are huge, and air ventilation is good. Free Wi-Fi facilities are available here with a high-speed. The library is huge and enough to gain knowledge. The hostel's infrastructure is good, and good facilities are provided in it. The mess is available in the hostel only. The quality of the food served is also good since the mess is regulated by students only. There is a huge scope for sports and games. There are separate playgrounds for every sport.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Agriculture Engineering - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: It is a really good college with a really good hostel.

review_content.Placements: Companies like Tech Mahindra, etc., offer jobs to students of our college. For different departments, different jobs are also available here. But students mainly focus on preparing for different competitive exams. Students also get well jobs here. Recently many students got jobs in Mahindra Tractor company.
review_content.Infrastructure: The quality of the food provided in the mess is good here, and the mess is suitable as it is under the supervision of students. If students have suggestions about the food, then mess body considers that suggestion and make changes accordingly in the menu as well as in other things.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Agriculture Engineering - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: College is really good for making students ready for the future.

review_content.Placements: 50% of students were placed. Minimum package is 3.5 LPA and Maximum package is 5 LPA. Average package is 3 LPA. Companies like Mahindra & Mahindra, John Deer visits our college every year. Very few students get internship. Most of the students are interested in civil services so the placement is not that much high.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi available in all campus. Classrooms are very good and newly designed with well-maintained lights and fans. Huge library available in the college with a separate reading room available. Hostels are well maintained and separate Wi-Fi facility in hostel. Good quality of food available in canteen and mess. Also medical facilities are provided without fees. A huge playground is available with all the sport facilities.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Agriculture Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Our college has a good atmosphere that helps students prepare for competitive exams.

review_content.Placements: In our college, almost 60% of students are placed. The salary package offered is 15 LPA. The lowest salary package offered is 5 LPA and the average salary package offered is 8 LPA. Top recruiting companies like Sahyadri Farms, Syngenta, etc., visit our campus. Internships are available to students in their final year of a four-month training programme.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available throughout the hostel area. Sports like football, volleyball, basketball, track and field sports, and indoor sports like badminton, table tennis, etc., are played on grounds. The quality of food in the mess is good.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Agriculture Engineering - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Campus and hostel life are good.

review_content.Placements: Placements are not that good because, in some agricultural colleges, placements are not available. The highest salary offered is about Rs. 30,000 to 40,000 per month and the lowest salary offered is between Rs. 5,000 to 10,000 per month. Mahindra and John Deere are some companies which are excited about college placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: High-quality computer laboratories are available, which are quite excited to see. There are laboratories of all departments such as FMPE, IDE, SWCE and APE. There is a hostel which is very good. The mess is available which is handled by student-faculty. Sports, medical facilities and games facilities are available.

college_info.college_name: Konark Institute of Science and Technology (KIST): Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Reviews, Info

highlights.summary:
The CAT 2026 registration is expected to start in the Aug, 2026 for admission to the MBA course.

A few more updates are given below:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Konark Institute of Science and Technology (KIST) offers a wide range of programmes to students at the UG and PG levels. The college is mainly concerned with streams such as Engineering and Business & Management Studies. At the UG level, the college offers courses such as B.E. / B.Tech. At the PG level, the college offers courses such as M.E./M.Tech and MBA/PGDM. Konark Institute of Science and Technology (KIST) courses are offered to students in Full Time mode. Further, the fees structure for Konark Institute of Science and Technology (KIST) courses stands around INR 1,34,000 to 2,72,000.

faqs.answer: A:    Konark Institute of Science and Technology (KIST) has courses such as B.Tech, MBA/PGDM, M.E./M.Tech to offer. These courses are in the stream of Engineering, Business & Management Studies. Konark Institute of Science and Technology (KIST) has specializations such as B.Tech specializations in Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, M.E./M.Tech specializations in Computer Science Engineering, Electronics Engineering, Power Engineering.
faqs.question: Which courses does Konark Institute of Science and Technology (KIST) offer to students?

faqs.answer: A:    The overall seats available across all courses offered by Konark Institute of Science and Technology (KIST) is up to 495. Good thing to know is that Konark Institute of Science and Technology (KIST) has courses which are approved by prominent Government bodies like AICTE.
faqs.question: How much is the intake across all courses being offerred at Konark Institute of Science and Technology (KIST)?

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Konark Institute of Science and Technology.

review_content.Placements: About 85% of students are placed in our course. The lowest salary package offered is 3.3 LPA. Companies like Infosys, Wipro, Tech Mahendra, etc., recruit students from CSE branch. Top role offered is software developer. This college is best for CSE, etc. All students get placed but other branches placement rate is low.
review_content.Infrastructure: Hostel facility is good as I stayed for 6 months. Three students are allowed to stay in one room in 1st year. Every room has a separate bathroom. The food in the canteen is very good. Separate 2 cars are assigned for hospital facility.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Good infrastructure and facilities.

review_content.Placements: I am a student of Konark institute of science and technology (kist) . There is very poor placement in your college; personally, I checked and R&D about our college placement but unfortunately, I didn't get any good placement record from the last 5-6 years . One who wants to join this college, please make sure that you have to go door to door for this and the college will not provide any good placement but over all, you can easily get a 10-15k salary job . But being an MBA graduate, it's not worthy. Highest package: 6 LPA and Lowest: 2 LPA There are top recruiting companies. review_summary.college_name: Konark Institute of Science and Technology (KIST) Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: The facilities are great. Infrastructure is great.

content.Placements: In my batch, I mean in Mechanical Engineering, most of the students graduated, and their placements are in corners. Our college, Konark Institute of Science and Technology, is good for placements and offerings. We are happy to be a part of this college.
content.Infrastructure: If we are talking about facilities, then there are lots of facilities available, like a big library, comfortable classrooms, a science lab, etc. Keeping that aside, without having some fun, nothing is valuable in your life. There is a big playground where we always play.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: The college of engineering.

content.Placements: Placements are good. I was checking after getting admission to this college in the last 5 to 6 years. 85% of students got placed. Even big companies come to give placements to the students like Mahindra, Wipro, Infosys, Bajaj Motors, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has a good infrastructure for both study and hostel rooms. Labs are so good for engineering students. Classrooms are well-maintained and the library is cool. There is good quality in hostel like discipline, well-wasted staff, quality food in your canteen, good medical facilities, personal cab for emergency medical services, making more sports and games good in college, having a good playground, and a good environment.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Review of Konark Institute of Science and Technology.

content.Placements: About 85% of students are placed in our course. The lowest salary package offered is 3.3 LPA. Companies like Infosys, Wipro, Tech Mahendra, etc., recruit students from CSE branch. Top role offered is software developer. This college is best for CSE, etc. All students get placed but other branches placement rate is low.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel facility is good as I stayed for 6 months. Three students are allowed to stay in one room in 1st year. Every room has a separate bathroom. The food in the canteen is very good. Separate 2 cars are assigned for hospital facility.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: I am a student of Konark institute of science and technology (kist) . There is very poor placement in your college; personally, I checked and R&D about our college placement but unfortunately, I didn't get any good placement record from the last 5-6 years . One who wants to join this college, please make sure that you have to go door to door for this and the college will not provide any good placement but over all, you can easily get a 10-15k salary job . But being an MBA graduate, it's not worthy. Highest package: 6 LPA and Lowest: 2 LPA There are top recruiting companies. No top company but there are Tech Mahindra , Motherson, Americans Express, etc. There is a low number of students who got internship programs, but I think this is their problem if they are not fit for that internship. The top role offered is in finance.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: I am absolutely satisfied with the fee structure.

content.Placements: About 90% of students are placed in our course. The lowest salary package offered is 3.3 LPA. Companies like Infosys, Wipro, etc., recruit students from the CSE branch. The top role offered is software developer.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel facility is good as I stayed for three years. It provides free Wi-Fi, and three students are allowed to stay in one room. Every room has a separate bathroom and toilet. The food in the canteen is very good. A separate car is assigned for the hospital facility.

reviews.review_heading: The facilities are great. Infrastructure is great.
reviews.review_text: If we are talking about facilities, then there are lots of facilities available, like a big library, comfortable classrooms, a science lab, etc. Keeping that aside, without having some fun, nothing is valuable in your life. There is a big playground where we always play.

reviews.review_heading: The college of engineering.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a good infrastructure for both study and hostel rooms. Labs are so good for engineering students. Classrooms are well-maintained and the library is cool. There is good quality in hostel like discipline, well-wasted staff, quality food in your canteen, good medical facilities, personal cab for emergency medical services, making more sports and games good in college, having a good playground, and a good environment.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Konark Institute of Science and Technology.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facility is good as I stayed for 6 months. Three students are allowed to stay in one room in 1st year. Every room has a separate bathroom. The food in the canteen is very good. Separate 2 cars are assigned for hospital facility.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text:
Our college has a good infrastructure for both study and hostel rooms, like in campus you can get wi-fi , and labs are so good for engineering students. Classrooms are well maintained and the library is cool.
There is good quality in hostel: discipline, well-waisted staff, quality food in your canteen, good for medical facilities, personal cab for emergency medical services and making more sport and games good in college, having a good playground and a good environment.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied with the fee structure.
reviews.review_text: The hostel facility is good as I stayed for three years. It provides free Wi-Fi, and three students are allowed to stay in one room. Every room has a separate bathroom and toilet. The food in the canteen is very good. A separate car is assigned for the hospital facility.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good facilities and placements.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is good, neat and clean. Canteen facilities are good. Sports facilities are available in college. The classrooms have Wi-Fi facilities and projectors. The college library is always open, and you can go there any time and study.

reviews.review_heading: It is bad for placements and infrastructure, and it has poor facilities.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is good. The library is good for studies. Wi-Fi is available, but it doesn't work properly. Hostel rooms have attached bathrooms. They say that they clean bathrooms every week, but they will clean after 1-2 months if you request them. The hostel is on campus. It has a small cafeteria. No shop is available nearby. The food quality in the canteen is bad.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the developed infrastructure and facilities provided by the college.
reviews.review_text: The library is the most beautiful place where you can use any source, from hard copies to computerised systems. Classrooms and labs could be better than what it is now. The hostels are much better. You get a bathroom and balcony attached to each room.

reviews.review_heading: The college is value for money.
reviews.review_text: The lab facilities are available but not used mostly. From 1st year to 2nd year, the classrooms are conducted every day by the faculty members, but after that, all faculty members listen to only those students who don't want lectures. There are no rules for the hostel, and food is overall below average because many students give money to the mess in-charge to make chicken and other dishes in front of all students. Medical facilities are good, and for sports, only cricket is available.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members of our college are very helpful. Our campus is wonderful.
reviews.review_text: Our college is huge as it is spread around 8 acres of land. Our college has all the facilities like a canteen, sports and a library where thousands of books are available for students. There is a gymnasium for a healthy life for students. The most important thing in our college is greenery.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Konark Institute of Science and Technology (KIST).
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very good. The campus is Wi-Fi enabled. Our college provides facilities like a well-maintained library and clean and hygienic food. Here you will find a small cafeteria. The hostel is very good with attached bathrooms and separate blocks for both boys and girls. The hostel is also equipped with broadband service. Labs are well-equipped with all the facilities.

reviews.review_heading: The college provides very poor service. I do not recommend anyone join this college.
reviews.review_text: The college provides very poor service and quality of the facilities in our hostel. Quality of food is served in the mess and canteen. Medical facilities, sports and games are provided by our college. The infrastructure of classrooms and library are very bad.

reviews.review_heading: No learning environment, very poor placements, below average faculty members and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of college is good enough but facilities are poor, computer systems in labs are outdated, Wi-Fi does not work properly, the library facility is good but classrooms are a mess as fans do not work properly. Hostel facilities are okay but the quality of drinking water is not good, purifiers are there but they aren't cleaned regularly. There are medical facilities. Mess and canteen is there but the quality is not good enough. Good food is a challenge here. College does not conduct spo...

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with faculty, infrastructure and others. The college also provides a good education.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good, and there are air-conditioned labs and huge accommodation capacity library. Hostels are really good for students. There are two huge playgrounds for sports, but the canteen is a little disappointed here. The college is located near NIST (National Institute of Science and Research) and IIT Bhubaneswar.

reviews.review_heading: College has been nice but needs improvement in many ways, let it be labs activities or even sports.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure was built proper but lacked much facilities, classrooms were normal. Labs needed more advancement and equipments. Basic things were only present but needed an upgrade. Hostel can't hold much strength, food was okay accordingly. Sports and games need to focused.

reviews_list.review_title: A very poor college in academics with zero placements.

review_content.Placements: Placements in the college were nil. Not even a single company visited the campus for placements of our batch and senior's batch. The college doesn't even make any efforts for inviting companies to the campus for placements. The college doesn't provide any internships. You have to look for placements and internships on your own.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is decent enough. The college has computer labs, but they are not that well-equipped. Classrooms are big but not neat and clean. The college has a nice library with ample books to refer. Food served in the canteen is not that good. Hostel facilities are very bad, and the rooms are very small and not in proper condition.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: Such type of college should be shut down.

review_content.Placements: There are no placements or campus interviews in the college. No senior or current students are placed from any branch. There is no question of the highest or lowest package with no placements, and the same goes with the internships. There is no placement cell in the college.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college has no proper infrastructure. The city is famous for the waterfall, and so is the college. There is a leakage in every corner. There are no other facilities like Wi-Fi, classroom, library, medical, and sports and games.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: Good infrastructure, but not satisfied with the faculty and management.

review_content.Placements: Placements in the college are not that good. Only one or two companies visit the college for placements. There were no placements for two of our senior batches. What I heard from my seniors is that the companies offer call centre jobs. But from last year onwards, the college is working at bringing in good placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is good. The college has a huge library and good sports facilities with basketball, volleyball and tennis courts. We also have a swimming pool, and the computer labs are good with well-equipped computers. Classrooms are spacious, but the benches and cleanliness are a concern. The hostels are not that good.

overview_faqs.question: Is Tasgaonkar Group of Institutions a good college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Tasgaonkar Group of Institutions is a well-known institution for MBA/PGDM, MCA, B.E. / B.Tech, After 10th Diploma, B.Pharma, D.Pharma, M.E./M.Tech courses. These programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. Not just this, it has also been rated 3.14 on Campus Life, 1.79 on Placements, 2.37 on Faculty and 2.81 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Tasgaonkar Group of Institutions Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: The worst college in Mumbai for engineering.

content.Placements: The college was not at all good when it comes to placements. Maximum students are not least in the placement and no good companies come for the recruitment of the final year students. The maximum package was 400000 rupees per annum and the average package was around 222000 rupees for annum and the lowest package was around 150000 per annum. 35 percent students were place d during my year but not in good MNCs like TCS, Will, L&T etc. Startups come to recruit students. Top roles offered are in sales department.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is bad. Our college has good sports facilities like football ground basketball ground tennis court. College supports in intercollegiate sports events. The Wi-Fi facility is bad. It didn't work properly in campus. The classrooms were spacious but cleanliness was a big concern. Library had books with full of dust on it. There was hostel facility which was separate for both boys and girls. There was no canteens on campus. There was no as such infrastructure facilities in the college. The campus is really bad.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: It is the worst college, and it mainly focuses on money.

content.Placements: There were no placements at all. It is the worst ever college, and they didn't even pay back my EBC scholarship. I suggest that never join this institute. There are no teachers here and waste of career and studies here.
content.Infrastructure: There are no Wi-Fi facility, labs and medical facilities. Hostels are the worst, and the food is also the worst. It is the worst college. Only Rs. 500 was due, so they didn't allow to write the final year exams, because of that I got less marks in those subjects. The college focuses only on fees, but not on students career.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: A very poor college in academics with zero placements.

content.Placements: Placements in the college were nil. Not even a single company visited the campus for placements of our batch and senior's batch. The college doesn't even make any efforts for inviting companies to the campus for placements. The college doesn't provide any internships. You have to look for placements and internships on your own.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is decent enough. The college has computer labs, but they are not that well-equipped. Classrooms are big but not neat and clean. The college has a nice library with ample books to refer. Food served in the canteen is not that good. Hostel facilities are very bad, and the rooms are very small and not in proper condition.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: Such type of college should be shut down.

content.Placements: There are no placements or campus interviews in the college. No senior or current students are placed from any branch. There is no question of the highest or lowest package with no placements, and the same goes with the internships. There is no placement cell in the college.
content.Infrastructure: The college has no proper infrastructure. The city is famous for the waterfall, and so is the college. There is a leakage in every corner. There are no other facilities like Wi-Fi, classroom, library, medical, and sports and games.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure, but not satisfied with the faculty and management.

content.Placements: Placements in the college are not that good. Only one or two companies visit the college for placements. There were no placements for two of our senior batches. What I heard from my seniors is that the companies offer call centre jobs. But from last year onwards, the college is working at bringing in good placements.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is good. The college has a huge library and good sports facilities with basketball, volleyball and tennis courts. We also have a swimming pool, and the computer labs are good with well-equipped computers. Classrooms are spacious, but the benches and cleanliness are a concern. The hostels are not that good.

reviews.review_heading: The worst college in Mumbai for engineering.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is bad. Our college has good sports facilities like football ground basketball ground tennis court. College supports in intercollegiate sports events. The Wi-Fi facility is bad. It didn't work properly in campus. The classrooms were spacious but cleanliness was a big concern. Library had books with full of dust on it. There was hostel facility which was separate for both boys and girls. There was no canteens on campus. There was no as such infrastructure facilit...

reviews.review_heading: It is the worst college, and it mainly focuses on money.
reviews.review_text: There are no Wi-Fi facility, labs and medical facilities. Hostels are the worst, and the food is also the worst. It is the worst college. Only Rs. 500 was due, so they didn't allow to write the final year exams, because of that I got less marks in those subjects. The college focuses only on fees, but not on students career.

reviews.review_heading: A very poor college in academics with zero placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is decent enough. The college has computer labs, but they are not that well-equipped. Classrooms are big but not neat and clean. The college has a nice library with ample books to refer. Food served in the canteen is not that good. Hostel facilities are very bad, and the rooms are very small and not in proper condition.

reviews.review_heading: Such type of college should be shut down.
reviews.review_text: The college has no proper infrastructure. The city is famous for the waterfall, and so is the college. There is a leakage in every corner. There are no other facilities like Wi-Fi, classroom, library, medical, and sports and games.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure, but not satisfied with the faculty and management.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. The college has a huge library and good sports facilities with basketball, volleyball and tennis courts. We also have a swimming pool, and the computer labs are good with well-equipped computers. Classrooms are spacious, but the benches and cleanliness are a concern. The hostels are not that good.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure with a nice atmosphere to study.
reviews.review_text: The college has a good infrastructure with spacious classrooms and well-equipped computer labs. The college has Wi-Fi facilities and a huge campus with an Olympic size swimming pool. It also has basketball, volleyball and lawn tennis courts. The best thing about the campus is that it has lots of trees because of which the atmosphere is very pleasant.

reviews.review_heading: The college and its teaching faculty are good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. The college provides the Wi-Fi facility, and the labs have computers with updated versions of the software. The library is big enough and has many numbers of books. The college has a sports room where there are a carrom board, chess board and table tennis. Classrooms are well-maintained. The college also has a good canteen.

reviews.review_heading: If you had another option, don't join this college.
reviews.review_text: Initially, the infrastructure of the college was okay, but as the time elapsed, it is becoming worse day by day. Toilets are in bad condition, and there is a leakage from the ceiling during the rainy season. A few years ago, there were staff members and students, but now the college seems empty.

reviews.review_heading: The management and quality of education are not worth the money.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is very bad as the facilities like Wi-Fi, medical, sports and games are not available. The library is good. The condition of labs and classrooms is the worst. The canteen is good and offers many varieties, but the prices are high. Hostel rooms are average. Some roofs have leakage problems all the time. Many places on the campus are dirty.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied because of the worst faculty, food, crowd. No discipline and placements.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are always under renovation. The library and labs are available. Food provided in the canteen is not good, students find a piece of steel or nail in the food they eat. The prices are double, even for a water bottle. They include the cost of using cooler also. Not even a single room is clean. One can find rainwater till the level of the ground floor, in the rainy season. The teachers don't give marks in practicals despite such a worst teaching.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied with the management.
reviews.review_text: No Wi-Fi facility is provided on the campus. A lab is present, but there are no computers or any practical instruments. Even the internet connection is not available. The library is good with books required. The management of the library is good. Medical facilities are not available. Cultural events, sports and games are conducted in the college, and only these are good in the college.

reviews.review_heading: Try some other college better than this.
reviews.review_text: The college has an awesome infrastructure. There is a river nearby. Classrooms are airy. The college has many grounds for cricket, football, and basketball. Many canteens are available on the campus. Hostel facility is there, but don't expect anything more than a bed there. A swimming pool and many huts are available in the college.

reviews.review_heading: Last Option for Engineering Students.
reviews.review_text: The college is built in spacious area. 3 Engineering colleges amongst them one is closed,  2 Diploma Colleges and one Masters college is built in the area. The campus od college is maintained fairly with garden. Classrooms are spacious but without Wi-Fi facilities. Our college was totally in construction during my course tenure which is still not completed. Lack of electricity and water in the college.

reviews.review_heading: Nothing is good here leaving some teachers.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good, but maintainence is not proper. There is no proper facility even for drinking water. Water here provided is of village type water. In washroom, there is no water properly. No proper electricity as the college lies in village area. The only thing that is good here is playground.

reviews.review_heading: Not satisfied with my college because of its bad infrastructure, maintenance and faculty.
reviews.review_text: NO Wi-Fi, LABS but not working, classrooms but no good teachers, Library is good and no medical facilities, sports and games functions are good and available. Canteen is good but price of food is more than average there. Nice hostel but needs some maintenance. Infrastructure is not good at all.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: LNCT Group of Colleges is an institute which offers various courses at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time programmes from streams such as Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences and Business & Management Studies. At the UG level, students can choose the available programmes such as B.E. / B.Tech, B.Pharma and D.Pharma. Talking about PG level, some of the available courses include M.E./M.Tech and MBA/PGDM. The fee structure for the LNCT Group of Colleges programmes is around INR 39,000 to 97,200.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely satisfied because of the faculty, placements, and teaching, which are all really good.

review_content.Placements: Almost all the students were placed. The highest package for BE in ECE is 20 lakh, the median package is 5 lakh, and the average package is 7 lakhs per annum. Top recruiting companies include Google, Amazon, Byju's, etc. Every student who applies for internships gets one.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure are good for my department. There are some network issues inside the campus, but the classrooms are very clean and well-maintained. Labs are spacious, and all instruments are available in the lab. The mess and canteen food is also good, and there are cafes inside the campus as well.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Not happy with the college dress rules. No.1 private college in MP, but infrastructure is average.

review_content.Placements: One thing that I like the most about this college is the campus placement. Every year, almost 70-80% of the students of this college get placed. The average package of this college is about 6 LPA, and last year the highest was 1.12 crores/annum. The top recruiting companies are Cognizant, TCS, Wipro, Deutsche Bank, Cisco, HCL, etc. The internships cracked by many students are off-campus.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are three colleges in this campus: LNCT, LNCT&S, and LNCTE. The labs here are good and well-conditioned. There is a central library available where you can find different kinds of books and journals and study. Additionally, there is a dispensary for medical needs. The campus also offers many sports facilities such as basketball, volleyball, and badminton courts for outdoor games, along with various indoor games. Canteens are also available with good food quality.

review_summary.college_name: LNCT (bhopal) indore campus Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure and supportive faculty with best teachers.

content.Placements: JNCT College's placement ratio is average, around 4 to 5 LPA. The highest placement is 1.5 crore in Amazon. Many companies like Infosys, Mahindra, Carwale, and others recruit here. Fewer students are placed, mostly from the CSE course.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are good in this college. There is a library, many classrooms with Wi-Fi, and courses like B.Tech, Pharma, BBA, and more. The college has a ground for games and a canteen with average food.
content.Faculty: Teachers are very knowledgeable. Faculty is supportive. Semester exams are not very tough. It depends on your studies and understanding of lectures. Exams are moderate.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: It is all over good, you also get good exposure with a great crowd and a nice campus.

content.Placements: Around 70-80% of students get placed in my branch, and decent companies visit the campus. Most students get internships in different semesters. Faculty, staff, and others are good and helpful. You can get great exposure on campus, and the campus life is also great.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good. Every building has its own library. The campus is large and has different buildings for different curriculum and courses. Campus life and hostels are also decent for students.
content.Faculty: Teachers are great and have a good amount of experience, they are qualified and helpful.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied because of the faculty, placements, and teaching, which are all really good.

content.Placements: Almost all the students were placed. The highest package for BE in ECE is 20 lakh, the median package is 5 lakh, and the average package is 7 lakhs per annum. Top recruiting companies include Google, Amazon, Byju's, etc. Every student who applies for internships gets one.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure are good for my department. There are some network issues inside the campus, but the classrooms are very clean and well-maintained. Labs are spacious, and all instruments are available in the lab. The mess and canteen food is also good, and there are cafes inside the campus as well.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Not happy with the college dress rules. No.1 private college in MP, but infrastructure is average.

content.Placements: One thing that I like the most about this college is the campus placement. Every year, almost 70-80% of the students of this college get placed. The average package of this college is about 6 LPA, and last year the highest was 1.12 crores/annum. The top recruiting companies are Cognizant, TCS, Wipro, Deutsche Bank, Cisco, HCL, etc. The internships cracked by many students are off-campus.
content.Infrastructure: There are three colleges in this campus: LNCT, LNCT&S, and LNCTE. The labs here are good and well-conditioned. There is a central library available where you can find different kinds of books and journals and study. Additionally, there is a dispensary for medical needs. The campus also offers many sports facilities such as basketball, volleyball, and badminton courts for outdoor games, along with various indoor games. Canteens are also available with good food quality.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Campus and college life are not much; this college is for study only.

content.Placements: The package is around 3.5 lacs, and the package is around 1 crore. If you have decent skills, you can easily get a package of 4-5 lacs. Many companies offer good packages, like 10+ students getting placed on the package of 20 LPA as well as the majority of students getting in at 4-5 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: They have a good number of labs, multiple where they were having. The hostel is great; they have very good facilities, the rooms, and the campus environment. Everything is good about the hostel; they have Wi-Fi facilities as well, an attached bathroom, and 24 hours of electricity.

admission_process.title: LNCT Group of Colleges Admission Process 2025

paragraphs:
LNCT Group of Colleges course admissions are done based on entrance and merit depending on the course. The university accepts applications in offline mode only. Interested students can get theLNCT Group of Collegesapplication form from the university campus. The form has to be submitted along with specified documents.
Students can pursue UG and PG programmes in fields of Engineering, Medicine and Health Sciences and Business and Management Studies, and more. To know about the eligibility of LNCT Group of Colleges courses, students can visit the website.

LNCT Group of Colleges fee structure consists of caution deposit, exam fee, hostel fee, and more. The mode of payment for LNCT Group of Colleges fees is online. Interested candidates can check below for more details on LNCT Group of Colleges admission:

description: LNCT Group of Colleges cutoff 2025 was released via MPBE entrance exam for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course. For the General HS category students, the last round cutoff range was between 449663 and 1414850 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. Considering the lowest cutoff rank of 449663, B.E. in Mechanical Engineering turned out to be the most competitive branch for admission. In the first round, the cutoff rank for the same branch was 576948.
Considering the JEE Main last round cutoff 2025 for the General HS category students, the top most competitive course for admission was B.E. / B.Tech, with a cutoff rank closing at 449663.
For more categories, rounds and quotas, candidates must use the provided filters.
Some of the important dates related to JEE Main 2026 for admission are provided below. Candidates can keep track of the upcoming dates to be eligible for admission.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and supportive faculty with best teachers.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are good in this college. There is a library, many classrooms with Wi-Fi, and courses like B.Tech, Pharma, BBA, and more. The college has a ground for games and a canteen with average food.

reviews.review_heading: It is all over good, you also get good exposure with a great crowd and a nice campus.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good. Every building has its own library. The campus is large and has different buildings for different curriculum and courses. Campus life and hostels are also decent for students.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of the faculty, placements, and teaching, which are all really good.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure are good for my department. There are some network issues inside the campus, but the classrooms are very clean and well-maintained. Labs are spacious, and all instruments are available in the lab. The mess and canteen food is also good, and there are cafes inside the campus as well.

reviews.review_heading: Not happy with the college dress rules. No.1 private college in MP, but infrastructure is average.
reviews.review_text: There are three colleges in this campus: LNCT, LNCT&S, and LNCTE. The labs here are good and well-conditioned. There is a central library available where you can find different kinds of books and journals and study. Additionally, there is a dispensary for medical needs. The campus also offers many sports facilities such as basketball, volleyball, and badminton courts for outdoor games, along with various indoor games. Canteens are also available with good food quality.

reviews.review_heading: Campus and college life are not much; this college is for study only.
reviews.review_text:
They have a good number of labs, multiple where they were having.
The hostel is great; they have very good facilities, the rooms, and the campus environment. Everything is good about the hostel; they have Wi-Fi facilities as well, an attached bathroom, and 24 hours of electricity.

reviews.review_heading: Review of LNCT Group of Colleges.
reviews.review_text: LNCT College has a great campus. The campus is very large too. The campus has many things to visit and can be explored very nicely. The campus is nicely separated into sections: one side has a playground, the other side has a canteen and cafeteria, and then there are three buildings where classes are held.

reviews.review_heading: LNCT, the top private college of Madhya Pradesh.
reviews.review_text: There are specific labs dedicated to each subject like workshop, computer lab, English lab, mechanical and civil labs, electrical labs, chemistry labs, and much more. There is a central library where you can issue books. There are 3 boys' and 2 girls' hostel buildings costing 80 thousand to around 1 LPA according to the room you prefer.

reviews.review_heading: Everything that you should know about INCT from a student at INCT.
reviews.review_text: In the classroom, there will be a smart board, and in some classrooms, there is AC, but they are of no use; they don't work. Talking about the hostel, for boys, there are 3 hostels, in which a new hostel is made; that new hostel is good and has more facilities, but they are 3-seater. In the hostel, you will get Wi-Fi, but again, mostly they don't work, and there is a firewall in the Wi-Fi that will not let you open everything. In the mess, food quality has mixed reviews, but they are edible only...

reviews.review_heading: LNCT: Disguise of a school and college.
reviews.review_text: This college has good infrastructure spread over an area of 55 acres. Classrooms have a projector and well-seated benches. The living condition of the new boys' hostel here is premium, but the food is below average; you have to rely on canteen food here. This college has excellent sports facilities with grounds and pitches for almost all sports. You can go out from campus on weekdays, allowed only on Sunday.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with college faculty members , overall great college to be in.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure here is good, one of the best in MP if we exclude the national institutes. Classrooms, halls, seminar halls, and the library are all in good condition. The quality of hostels here depends on which hostel you choose; the hostel that I live in is quite good because it is freshly built.

reviews.review_heading: All Round Experience of Lnct College.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is pretty decent. Wi-fi labs, up to date computer labs, Projector in every class, around 40 percent of class have A. C. Language Labs are also there. Campus is not that big but alot of infrastructure and buildings are in making process. There are 2 canteens. One for main building and other in E building. There are ending machines in every campus building and hostels. There is also a beautiful temple and lush green environment. Hostel facility is provided for only first yea...

reviews.review_heading: This college is very helpful for engineering students and the facilities of the college are good.
reviews.review_text: The teaching facilities are very excellent. The infrastructure of the college is so good. Greenery is everywhere in college. In our entire building, there is Wi-Fi. In our college, there is a lab for practicals like Physics lab, mechanical lab, computer lab, civil lab, etc. Every day, classrooms were cleaned. In the library, there is a lot of silence for study. The hostel that was given by the college is so good but the quality of the food is bad. The canteen food is nice and medical facilities ...

reviews.review_heading: 75% attendance is a must.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for my course, department, and library. Anywhere has Wi-Fi available. The infrastructure is very good. Hostel facilities are available but only for first-year students. Mess is available and the food quality is good. Sports, medical and games are available. And there is a lot of ground available.

reviews.review_heading: Lnct is totally a value for money college.
reviews.review_text:
The facilities on my campus is very good, like Wi-Fi network, Labs, classroom, and library. There are a lot of sport activities going on on my campus on a daily basis and there are also a lot of internship seminar going on, which I really enjoy because it always teach us something new on our day-to-day life 
.

reviews.review_heading: My engineering college LNCT Bhopal.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is at a decent level. Although the buildings were old, the amenities, security systems, toilets, etc. are well managed. All the labs are fully functional. There are well-built playgrounds for many sports here. Classes are well-maintained with projectors.

overview_faqs.question: Is GCT - Gnanamani College of Technology a good college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: GCT - Gnanamani College of Technology is a well-known institution for B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM, MCA courses. These programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. As per Shiksha's verified reviews, GCT - Gnanamani College of Technology has a rating of 3.81 on the basis of Shiksha-verified reviews by students. individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Gnanamani College of Technology is a really good engineering college.

content.Placements: Gnanamani College of Technology is a good placement college, with around 90-95% of students placed in good companies in 2021. This college's placement training team brought more reputed companies like TCS, Wipro, Amazon, Yamaha, Hyundai, Tech Mahindra, OLA, TVS, etc., for campus interviews. Placed students' salary packages are INR 2 - 9 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Gnanamani College of Technology's infrastructure facilities are very good. More than 15 courses are available in this college, with good classrooms, hi-tech laboratories, and well-stocked library facilities. This college has 3 hostels, and there is a separate girls' hostel. The hostel food is also good. Some limited sports ground facilities are also available in this college.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Really good infrastructure and faculty members teaching are so good for our studies.

content.Placements: Our college has good placements. Almost 50% of students got placed in the previous year. The highest salary package offered is INR 5 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered is INR 3 LPA. The average salary of INR 2.5 LPA is offered by top recruiting companies like Tech Mahindra, TCS, etc.
content.Infrastructure: There is electricity provided in the hostel, and the beds are good to moderate. Bathroom facilities are there, and the meal is good or not too bad. Registration for the hostel is easy; you have to fill out a form. Computer labs are working properly. There is only a small canteen.

content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and library facilities are available, as are good food quality. That is one of the basic amenities at the college. The canteen is very nice, and with the natural atmosphere, the college campus is well cleaned and maintained, making it peaceful for the students.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for South Indian students.

Labs are good, but some equipment doesn't work. Our classrooms are good. Air conditioning and digital boards are not available in our classrooms. The hostel is good. A playground is ava...

reviews.review_heading: 8.3 out of 10. Best education in a minimum fee.
reviews.review_text: There is electricity provided in hostel and then beds are good and moderate. Bathroom facilities are there. Meal is not too good or not too bad average. Registration for hostel is easy you have to fill a form. The hostel Fee is INR 40000.

reviews.review_heading: Review of GCT - Gnanamani College of Technology.
reviews.review_text: Many facilities are available in our college. Sports, canteen and a huge grounds like a cricket ground, football ground, tennis ground, hockey ground and also swimming pools are available.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college to study and have good time.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is excellent. There are laboratories equipment and many other good facilities. The library is sufficient. There is good Wi-Fi connectivity on the campus. We have enough space on the campus to organise special events. The facilities are outstanding in this college. A playground is also available.

reviews.review_heading: College life here is the best.
reviews.review_text: I am a day scholar, but I know somewhat about the hostel premises. It has a good environment to stay for 1st-year students. Other than 1st-year students, there are separate hostels, and the girls' hostel has a good security system. Food was very good, and they serve non-vegetarian on Wednesday and Sunday. In our hostel, Black Sheep web series is also taken.

reviews.review_heading: The environment on the campus was friendly, and they provide good placements.
reviews.review_text: I would rate the facilities as moderate. Our institution is secured and they guided us on all occasions. We are satisfied with the college. Overall it provides excellent academics, transportation, and placement support.

reviews.review_heading: My college is very good.All staff and professors are very helpful. Placement percent is average.
reviews.review_text:
1. My course B.E computer Science and engineering have separate department and labs, classroom with Wi-Fi facilities and library available. 
2. In our hostel all facilities are available like medical, Wi-Fi, hot water, cold water, many games, canteen, mess food also good.

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied with faculty members, but placements were good in the year 2019.
reviews.review_text: Our college has poor facilities like very poor drinking water. They do not provide Wi-Fi during class hours, but classrooms and libraries are good. Hostel facilities are the worst. Bathrooms and living rooms are bad, and they don't have good water facilities. Medical facilities are bad, and the coach is not good for sports and games.

reviews.review_heading: The college is amazing, and I'm glad that I joined here.
reviews.review_text: There are no issues with the infrastructure of our college. The college has a nice academic building. They offer all the facilities every day. There are separate blocks for all the departments. The entire campus is Wi-Fi enabled. We also have a separate library.

faqs.answer:
A:    University College of Engineering, Tindivanam, Anna University has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. from schools situated in Tamil Nadu.
Tamil Nadu native candidate who have passed any of the VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. or their equivalent exam from schools situated outside Tamil Nadu can also apply. They should produce Original Nativity Certificate.
Children of Central Government Employees, irrespective of their nativity, provided their parents or guardians (only if both parents are not alive) have been serving in Tamil Nadu continuously for the past five years can be eligible to apply.
Sons & daughters of All India service Tamil Nadu cadre officers are eligible to apply. A Self declaration from the parent in this regard is to be produced.
Children of employees in the Public Sector or Government recognised institutions had been working in their organisations for the past five years are also eligible, irrespective of their domicile.
Other State candidates who have studied VIII, IX, X, XI and XII Std. in Tamil Nadu are eligible to apply.

reviews.review_text: Hostels are good. Food quality and its quantity are good. Facilities and Management are good. The hostel is not strict. Mess food is okay to eat but not too bad. There is no study time in the hostel. The course is superb and teaching as well.

reviews.review_heading: Review of University College of Engineering, Tindivanam, Anna University.
reviews.review_text: The Wi-Fi is a bit slow. The infrastructure is good. The canteen doesn't have a variety of foods. Sports and games are better than average. We conduct a sports day every year, but we currently have some problems because of the pandemic.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the college facilities, placement, good environment and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text:
1. well equipped ventilated classrooms, library and laboratories. Computer laboratories with high bandwidth internet connection and friendly staffs. 
2. In Hostel, canteen and Mess are hygienic and having aware of health. Food qualities in canteen as well as mess is not bad and give special concentration on sports and games for all students.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is very nice and beautiful.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is located within the campus. I like my hostel, and it provides a free Wi-Fi facility, and the food served is very healthy and tasty. The library is open during working days. Our college also provides medical emergency facilities for 24 hours.

reviews.review_heading: Staff are friendly, and their way of teaching is good. There is no assurance of placements.
reviews.review_text: In UCET, Wi-Fi facilities are available for hostel students only. But we can use the internet in labs during our free time. Classrooms look good with infrastructures like fans, tables, windows and screen. Library facility is also good, and we can take up to two books from the library to study. Medical facilities are also available with good infrastructure. Sports and games events are conducted in our college and prizes are awarded to students who stood in the first three places. They also provid...

reviews.review_heading: A nominal college with decent facilities.
reviews.review_text: The college premises are good and well-ventilated. The college provides proper drinking water RO systems. Wi-Fi facility was not available in the college during my tenure but I heard from my juniors that the campus is now Wi-Fi enabled. Labs are good with perfectly working computers. The civil students have an open ground to perform their lab activities. The library doesn't have all the books required, but separate departmental libraries are provided, which are pretty decent. The medical support...

reviews.review_heading: Good facilities and faculty members to improve our lifestyle.
reviews.review_text: The Wi-Fi facility is strong up to first three months. Then it became week. The sports facilities are quite nice. The library is nice, but there are not many books in it. The quality of food is not nice. There are not many rooms available in this college.

reviews.review_heading: Moderately satisfied , education is good because of faculties but infrastructure is not that good.
reviews.review_text: In our college there is two labs with Ethernet, classrooms and library. There is a hostel with average infrastructure. I don't know more about hostel but I heard that the food is not that good. There is health centre in our college. Not much importance is given to sports .

reviews.review_heading: Good teachers are there, especially in ECE.
reviews.review_text: Wi-fi technology is provided around all labs, especially the information technology lab, computer science lab, electrical and electronics lab, and the common Wi-fi working at BSNL. So, the internet will be flawlessly connected with no compromises. Food is available in the mess and at the canteen.

reviews.review_heading: Review of University College of Engineering, Tindivanam, Anna University.
reviews.review_text:
The infrastructure is very average and has a hot atmosphere with sunny days. The college has a good climate during the winter season. The facilities of my hostel are very good, with a green garden and a peaceful breeze. The canteen is very dissatisfying.
We can only buy the necessary groceries; other junk foods are not sold here.

reviews.review_heading: Enjoying the college days.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is so good. The government has planned to build a new building for master's degrees in engineering. It will be done by the government soon. The hostel is so good. Mess food is better. Separate wifi is provided for each class room. They have 100+ systems for students in the lab.

reviews.review_heading: The college has really good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text:
I am very much satisfied with the infrastructure of the college. Hostels are very clean and have a good environment to study. It is excellent that it focuses 
less on classroom studies and tries to teach in a more practical way. Labs are very advanced.

reviews.review_heading: Very good experience and I am very happy.
reviews.review_text: The college is situated in the heart of the city. It is not uncommon to find hostel inmates complaining or even protesting about the poor quality of food served in the hotel mess. This is because, in most hostels, food is supplied by private contractors who are selected on the basis of the lowest charges rather than food quality.

overview_faqs.question: Is it worth to consider Arunai Engineering College as a good Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Arunai Engineering College is a reputed institute for B.Tech, MBA/PGDM, MCA, M.E./M.Tech. Students can opt these programs to pursue their career in Engineering, Business & Management Studies, IT & Software. Institute has trained & experienced faculty who deliver these programs. As per Shiksha verified reviews, Arunai Engineering College has a rating of 3.5 on the basis of reviews by students. Not just this, it has also been rated 3.7 on campuslife, 3 on placements, 3.8 on faculty and 3.5 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Arunai Engineering College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: It has a strong course curriculum with decent placements in EEE. Overall, it is good.

content.Placements: I am from the B.E. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering. About 70% of students get placed in the department every year. The highest package is about 3 LPA. Many top recruiting companies visit our college to hire students from our course. Most of our students attend placements. Top roles like testing, manager, etc., are offered.
content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure and facilities are good. The campus has a green environment. Facilities like labs and a library are fully equipped with air-conditioning. The hostel facility is average, and the food is better than average. Sports are conducted once a year.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Review of Arunai Engineering College.

content.Placements: I am from the Department of Computer Science. About 70% of students are placed in the department every year. The highest package is about 3 LPA. Many top recruiting companies visit our course, and most of our students attend the placements. Top roles include testing, manager, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure and facilities are good, with a campus surrounded by a green environment. Infrastructure like labs and the library are fully equipped with air conditioning. The hostel facilities are average, and the food is better than average. Sports events are conducted once a year.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Value for money and useful for local students.

content.Placements: Only 20% of students are placed. The highest salary package was 3 lakhs per annum. No top recruiting companies for the course. No other students got placed in the internship program. Juniors developed only the top roles placed in my college. I suggest improving your skills and getting a job on your own.
content.Infrastructure: All the facilities like Wi-Fi, classrooms, library, labs, and restrooms are good and maintained properly. The hostel is nice; it provides medical facilities, a canteen, and sports and games, which are useful to reduce mental stress for hostel students. The food provided by the hostel is of medium quality.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science AndEngineering (Cyber Security) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Highly crowded campus with all the facilities.

content.Placements: The average annual salary offered by companies is between Rs. 19.8 lakhs and Rs. 3.4 lakhs. Internships pay between Rs. 30,000 and Rs. 15,000 per month. About 80% of students get internships with stipends.
content.Infrastructure: Arunai Engineering College offers a wide range of engineering courses at both the undergraduate and postgraduate levels. Thousands of students graduate from our college each year. The college provides a supportive environment with good water and hostel facilities.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Arunai Engineering College is really the best college.

content.Placements: Arunai Engineering College is the best placement college in Tamil Nadu. Every year above 90% of students are placed in more reputed companies like Yamaha, TVS, IBM, Accenture, and Infosys. These companies offer more job opportunities to this college’s students. The salary package is INR 4-8 Lacs per year.
content.Infrastructure: This college's infrastructure facilities are excellent. More comfortable classrooms are available in this college. Hi-tech laboratories are available in this college. This college's hostel facilities are very good, and hygienic food is available in the hostels. More sports ground facilities are available in this college.

hostel_campus.college_name: Arunai Engineering College Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: College has four hostels in all. As a new entrant to the college, the first year are guaranteed a separate hostel (Kalaingnar Mens Hostel), the second year students are housed at (Dr.A.P.J.Abdul Kalam Hostel), the third year students at the (New Mens Hostel) and the final year students at (Thanthai Periyar Hostel). Girls have a private, secluded and secure hostel (Mother Theresa Women's Hostel).

library.description: Arunai Engineering College library has collections of 40,385 volumes of text books, reference books, national and international journals in all branches. It subscribes to 234 journals (110 international and 124 national journals) and 219 e-journals. In addition, it also has Online Public Access Catalogue (OPAC) facility to save the access time of the users.

reviews.review_heading: It has a strong course curriculum with decent placements in EEE. Overall, it is good.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure and facilities are good. The campus has a green environment. Facilities like labs and a library are fully equipped with air-conditioning. The hostel facility is average, and the food is better than average. Sports are conducted once a year.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Arunai Engineering College.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure and facilities are good, with a campus surrounded by a green environment. Infrastructure like labs and the library are fully equipped with air conditioning. The hostel facilities are average, and the food is better than average. Sports events are conducted once a year.

reviews.review_heading: Value for money and useful for local students.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities like Wi-Fi, classrooms, library, labs, and restrooms are good and maintained properly. The hostel is nice; it provides medical facilities, a canteen, and sports and games, which are useful to reduce mental stress for hostel students. The food provided by the hostel is of medium quality.

reviews.review_heading: Highly crowded campus with all the facilities.
reviews.review_text: Arunai Engineering College offers a wide range of engineering courses at both the undergraduate and postgraduate levels. Thousands of students graduate from our college each year. The college provides a supportive environment with good water and hostel facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Arunai Engineering College is really the best college.
reviews.review_text: This college's infrastructure facilities are excellent. More comfortable classrooms are available in this college. Hi-tech laboratories are available in this college. This college's hostel facilities are very good, and hygienic food is available in the hostels. More sports ground facilities are available in this college.

reviews.review_heading: Top engineering college in Tiruvannamalai.
reviews.review_text: It's a stress-free environment with spacious classrooms everywhere. This was a very old engineering college in our district, even though it was maintained in good condition till now. There is a green environment everywhere, and our canteen serves high-quality foods.

reviews.review_heading: Like a mini university with various courses.
reviews.review_text: It was a famous and very old college of engineering in our district. The buildings were very constructive here. All the classrooms were very spacious for air-ventilation and some classes were air-conditioned. There is a very big canteen and they are providing high-quality foods.

reviews.review_heading: Arunai engineering college is the best college.
reviews.review_text: Arunai Engineering College's infrastructure is very beautiful. The classrooms are very spacious, and there are more laboratories and library facilities available. Good Wi-Fi network connectivity is provided. There are separate hostels for boys and girls, and 24-hour medical facilities are also available. The mess food is very healthy.

reviews.review_heading: Infrastructure is nice and placements are also good. Teachers help us to do projects.
reviews.review_text: There is a decent hostel life having libraries, physical education and Including a gym. Food is not bad at all. Both vegetarian and non vegetarian are provided. There is a decent menu in hostel mess. Separate hostels for boys and girls are there. Separate wardens are appointed.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good and friendly faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Lab facilities are not good because many instruments are not working. The quality of the food is not good. Classrooms are good. Library facilities are also good. There is Wi-Fi, but phones are not allowed.

reviews.review_heading: Our campus is eco-friendly, and management is good.
reviews.review_text: In the hostel, Wi-Fi and laboratories are good. The mess provides both vegetarian and non-vegetarian food. They also provide snacks and tea for some refreshments in the evening. There will be study hour and respective staffs will come to clarify our doubts. Our campus infrastructure is excellent and eco-friendly.

reviews.review_heading: A college that makes everyone stay forever happy.
reviews.review_text: Have great lab facilities to learn new things and helps us to grow in new technologies conducted. Many workshops and many symposiums and meeting conference on new technologies so that student get knowledge on the subject and very big libraries with lots of collection of books.

reviews.review_heading: We are not satisfied with the college.
reviews.review_text: The campus is average. The classrooms are average. The hostels are very bad, and the maintenance is very bad. Services are bad. The hostel food is really bad. Most of the students avoid hostel food.

reviews.review_heading: It has good faculty members, but placements should be improved.
reviews.review_text: Arunai Engineering College has the required infrastructure and facilities for the courses available here. The library is good, and it has all kinds of books and students can go there to improve their knowledge. Classrooms and labs are good enough for the students.

reviews.review_heading: Our college should improve placement activities, but the college is good.
reviews.review_text: Labs and classrooms are well-equipped. Our college provides facilities like TV, mess hall and geyser in the hostel. Non-vegetarian food is also provided in the hostel. Quality of the food served is good and hygiene.

description: Vaageswari College of Engineering cutoff 2025 has been released for admission to MBA and MCA programmes via the TSI ICET entrance examination result. Students should scroll down to this page to know the round, category, and year-wise cutoff for TSI ICET and other accepted exams. Refer to the pointers below for more updates:

Vaageswari College of Engineering TS EAMCET cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released as opening and closing ranks for the AI and HS quota. In the General category under the HS quota, the last round closing ranks ranged between 71983 and 117973 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) was the toughest to get admission into, considering its competitive cutoff rank. For

For B.E. / B.Tech admission, the top three most competitive branches were B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning), B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering and B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science), with competitive TS EAMCET last round cutoff ranks of 71983, 78521 and 80514, respectively. These ranks are valid for the students belonging to the General HS quota.

For 2026 admission, candidates can refer to the table below to view some of the important TS EAMCET dates. TS EAMCET is a state-level entrance test for admission to BE, B.Tech, BPharm, PharmD, B.Sc, B.FSc, and BVSc courses.

The TS EAMCET cutoff has been released for admission to Vaageswari College of Engineering. Candidates can view or download the consolidated year-wise and round-wise TS EAMCET cutoff lists in the form of PDF from the table below for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course.

Candidates can view the other specialisation options available for admission at multiple colleges accepting the TS EAMCET entrance exam. The comparison below is based on the last round cutoff rank of TS EAMCET for the General HS category students.

The Vaageswari College of Engineering MBA cutoff 2025 for the General HS category in the last round was 35015. In contrast, the cutoff in 2024 was 36768, and the 2023 cutoff was 33209 for the aforementioned course and category. According to this data, we can say that the competition for MBA has been fluctuating in the last 3 years.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Agricultural Engineering - Batch of 2017
reviews_list.review_title: Everything is good like teachers library infrastructure etc.

review_content.Placements: Some of our seniors got a job through campus placement. VST Tillers, Kirloskar Pumps and such companies are offering jobs here. In VST Tillers, they treated our agricultural engineers as a Technical Trainer. The salary offered by them is 13,000 and an extra 500 for food and accommodation per day. Almost all the final year students do their internship programme during the last semester as an inplant training. At this time, we get 8,000 as a stipend.
review_content.Infrastructure: 24-hours Wi-Fi is available. But, the computer lab is not much developed while comparing with the other self-financing colleges. The chemistry and physics labs are also very poor, but the electrical lab is sufficient. The other labs like geotechnical engineering lab and HMT labs are good. The library has sufficient books for all the students and a book bank scheme is there for providing individual copies of books to the students at half the price of the original. Really tasty food is served by our canteen, and the hostel rooms also sufficient to accommodate 4 people per room.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Agricultural Engineering - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: Really good infrastructure and facilities.

review_content.Placements: Unfortunately, there are no placements that are taking place in our college. But in a year, only 40 students are passing out. So the competition is less when compared to other engineering courses. The students who passed out are now working abroad or some are preparing for more competitive exams. Now the 32nd batch of this course is studying in the college as first-year students.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college is situated on the banks of Bharathappuzha. The college is situated in a 100 hector area and there are 3 buildings for classrooms, one library building and one college canteen. There is also a Krishi Vijnaan Kendra. The computer lab has its own Wi-Fi network. There is a large playground and the sports and games are also given importance as the academics. There is also a ladies hostel and a men's hostel. The hostel rooms are good. Food is also good. All the books are available in the library. There are also labs for each main course and workshops too.
