overview_faqs.question: Can Kelappaji College of Agricultural Engineering and Technology be considered as a reputed Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: The flagship courses offered at Kelappaji College of Agricultural Engineering and Technology are B.Tech. The Institute has experienced faculty offering the best education to students. On the basis of Shiksha verified reviews, Kelappaji College of Agricultural Engineering and Technology has a rating of 3.7 by students. The college's campuslife, placements, faculty and Infrastructure has been rated as 4.1, 3, 3.5 and 4.5 as per reviews by students.

review_summary.college_name: Kelappaji College of Agricultural Engineering and Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Agricultural Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Faculty members are good. Placement is not very much. The infrastructure and hostel are good.

content.Placements: To be honest, a very less percentage of students get placed in our college. The main two reasons for this are that a majority of students prefer higher studies and a less number of companies come for campus placements. However, companies will come if we consistently contact them and show enthusiasm for jobs rather than higher studies. Some banks, tractor companies, and irrigation companies are the top recruiting companies.
content.Infrastructure: Compared to all other government colleges, I would say our college provides better infrastructure and hostel facilities with good quality food. The college also supports students in sports and games by helping them participate in inter-agricultural national level and South Zone level competitions.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Food Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied with renowned faculty and infrastructure.

content.Placements: Most of the students in KCAET were well placed in food industries such as Hatsun, Jubilant Food Works, Kohinoor, etc. But most of them opted for higher studies in foreign countries such as New Zealand, Canada and Australia. However, it's our honour to be blessed with good alumni. The salary packages offered were decent and ranged between 1.5 LPA to 3 LPA. Students were offered roles such as production executive, quality controller, and also R&D executive. Most of the students got internships in the reputed organisations such as Pepsico, United Breweries, Britannia, Hatsun Agro Products, etc., which nurture to be the future leaders. There is a placement cell in the college, but it depends on us to utilise it effectively and to find the benefit through it.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Agricultural Engineering - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: Everything is good like teachers library infrastructure etc.

content.Placements: Some of our seniors got a job through campus placement. VST Tillers, Kirloskar Pumps and such companies are offering jobs here. In VST Tillers, they treated our agricultural engineers as a Technical Trainer. The salary offered by them is 13,000 and an extra 500 for food and accommodation per day. Almost all the final year students do their internship programme during the last semester as an inplant training. At this time, we get 8,000 as a stipend.
content.Infrastructure: 24-hours Wi-Fi is available. But, the computer lab is not much developed while comparing with the other self-financing colleges. The chemistry and physics labs are also very poor, but the electrical lab is sufficient. The other labs like geotechnical engineering lab and HMT labs are good. The library has sufficient books for all the students and a book bank scheme is there for providing individual copies of books to the students at half the price of the original. Really tasty food is served by our canteen, and the hostel rooms also sufficient to accommodate 4 people per room.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Agricultural Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: Really good infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: Unfortunately, there are no placements that are taking place in our college. But in a year, only 40 students are passing out. So the competition is less when compared to other engineering courses. The students who passed out are now working abroad or some are preparing for more competitive exams. Now the 32nd batch of this course is studying in the college as first-year students.
content.Infrastructure: The college is situated on the banks of Bharathappuzha. The college is situated in a 100 hector area and there are 3 buildings for classrooms, one library building and one college canteen. There is also a Krishi Vijnaan Kendra. The computer lab has its own Wi-Fi network. There is a large playground and the sports and games are also given importance as the academics. There is also a ladies hostel and a men's hostel. The hostel rooms are good. Food is also good. All the books are available in the library. There are also labs for each main course and workshops too.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Agricultural Engineering - Batch of 2014
individual_reviews.title: A walk through the waves of KCAET campus- great experience and lovely moments

content.Placements: Graduates from our college are placed in different fields of states and abroad. They worked most satisfactorily and commitment in every field. The first 5 to 6 batch students worked in teaching field as professors, associate professors, and assistant professors. Some of them worked in soil and water as well as in ground water departments. From next batch onwards so many of them worked in USA, Africa, and Gulf countries. From 17 to 27th batch, most of the graduates worked in different locations in India. Some worked in different projects in Gulf countries. Some were placed in banks as an agricultural specialist officer. Few of them worked in marketing field of irrigation product company, tractor and power tiller company and food industries. Few worked as research assistants, teaching assistants in agricultural institutions and colleges. Few were placed temporary basis in Adhma projects and other Panjayath projects. Almost 60-70% graduates were paced and they got a minimum salary of Rs. 15000. The average income was nearly Rs. 40000 rupees. Some of the companies which visited our college for campus interview are Cadbury, VST Tractors and Tillers, Jain Irrigation and Eastern etc. They offering marketing, field investigation, and seminar coordinator posts. 10-20% student got an internship from the college getting a minimum of Rs. 2000/month to a maximum of Rs. 8000/month and an average of Rs. 3000/month stipend.

overview_faqs.question: Is Government Engineering College, Ramanagara worth considering?
overview_faqs.answer: The flagship courses offered at Government Engineering College, Ramanagara are B.Tech. The Institute has experienced faculty offering the best education to students. On the basis of Shiksha verified reviews, Government Engineering College, Ramanagara has a rating of 3.1 by students. The college's campuslife, placements, faculty and Infrastructure has been rated as 3.2, 1.7, 4 and 2.7 as per reviews by students.

review_summary.college_name: Government Engineering College, Ramanagara Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied with the college.

content.Placements: Around 30-40% of the students got placed. The highest package offered was 5 LPA, and the lowest package was 3 LPA. Local IT and start-up companies visit the college. Around 70-80% of the students got internships in the last two years. You have to get a job on your own. There were no placements last year, only 4-5 companies came here 2 years ago. You can get a lot of free time here.
content.Infrastructure: There is no proper infrastructure as the college is still under development. The government has given 80 Crores budget to develop the campus. The campus has a library. Wi-Fi and hostel facilities are not available on the campus. Government hostels are available 7-8 km away. No proper bus facilities are there.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2015
individual_reviews.title: I am highly satisfied with the facilities provided by the college.

content.Placements: We didn't have any placements facilities because it was a new college then. But we went for an industrial visit for JMC construction company where we gain a good knowledge of site work. Faculty members guided us for some good companies, and some of us get some good jobs.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure and facilities were good. The library was very good. Lab facilities were good for the civil branch as we had all new equipment like dumpy level, theodolite, total station, etc. But the mechanical branch didn't have big machines, and they used to go to another college.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Review of Government Engineering College, Ramanagara.

content.Placements: Our college doesn't provide placement opportunities. Our college doesn't have a placement office. We have an alumni association. It is not good.
content.Infrastructure: Our college is under construction. The roads are not good. Our college is not maintained.
content.Faculty: Our teachers are good. They don't solve our problems. They are not concerned about students.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: If you have financial limitation, choose this college.

content.Placements: There is no placement department and no favourable placement scenario in the college but when we passed in this current year, there was one company which was taking the interview for the Civil Engineering field. Other than that there is no information about other branch placements.
content.Infrastructure: The lab is spacious but there is no complete equipment available in the laboratory. All the time, we are required to visit other colleges for conducting practicals and during the examination also, we had to visit other colleges for practicals examination as the campus construction is still going on.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: The college is good in terms of everything.

content.Placements: 1. the percentage of student were placed in our course are 45%. 2. The highest:-2.5lpa and the lowest:-1.80lpa. 3. They provide some reputed companies and mostly only startup companies. 4.100% company:-guru institutions. And may other companies 5. In PCB design.
content.Infrastructure: 1. in our colleges their is no free Wi-Fi, labs is also somewhat better, classroom was good and sufficient provide, And the one of the best library I think that our college had. 2. All the students from our colleges are happy with the facilities given by our hostel it had aa good and hygienic food, and in our hostel has a purifier, and every weekend they will provide a playing equipment and medical facilities are good.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: The college has very good placement with excellent skills.

review_content.Placements: There is a 100 percent placement in Computer Science Engineering. The lowest package is about 4 LPA, the average is about 8 LPA, and the highest is about 16 LPA. Flipkart, Genpact, Nokia, and many more good companies. We got around 85 to 95 percent internship.
review_content.Infrastructure: We have a nice campus, very good labs with proper internet connections. Good classrooms, badminton court, basketball court, etc. There is very good and healthy food in the hostel's mess. Medical facilities are also provided. Sports events are also organized, and there is almost 100 percent participation.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: A great college for women’s empowerment in technology.

review_content.Placements: The placement process at RCEW is quite active, especially for CSE students. Many companies like TCS, Capgemini, Infosys, Accenture, and Cognizant visit the campus. The average package is around 4–6 LPA. A few top students get higher offers from MNCs. The placement cell and training department conduct regular aptitude sessions, mock interviews, and coding tests to prepare students. Most students get placed if they are consistent with their skills, though getting a high-package job depends on individual performance.
review_content.Infrastructure: College infrastructure is good and well-maintained. Classrooms are clean and spacious. They are having projectors and Wi-Fi. Labs have all the required systems for software for coding and practical work. The library is peaceful with a good collection of books. The hostel is safe. It has basic facilities. The food quality in the mess can be improved.

Obtained at least 50% marks (45% marks in case of candidates belonging to reserved category such as SC, ST and Non creamy layer OBC and Non creamy layer MBC, PWD category only for relaxation in minimum academic qualification) in the qualifying examination.MCACandidate must have passed B.C.A/B.Sc. (Computer Science)/B.Sc. (IT)/B.E. (CSE)/ B.Tech. (CSE) / B.E. (IT) / B.Tech. (IT) or equivalent Degree. Or Candidate must have passed any graduation degree (e.g.: B.E. / B.Tech. / B.Sc / B.Com. / B.A./ B. Voc./ etc., ) preferably with Mathematics at 10+2 level or at Graduation level and obtained at least above mentioned marks (45% marks in case of candidates belonging to reserved category) in the qualifying examination. (for students having no Mathematics background compulsory bridge course will be framed by the respective University/ Institution and additional bridge courses related to computer subjects as per the norms of the concerned University)

review_summary.college_name: Rajasthan College of Engineering for Women (RCEW) Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Good campus with average faculty.

content.Placements: I am from the B.Tech (Computer Science Engineering) 2024–2028 batch. The placement rate is around 70–80 percent. The highest package is about 10 LPA, the lowest is around 3 LPA, and the average package is 5 LPA. Top recruiters include Infosys, TCS, Wipro, Tech Mahindra, and Accenture. Around 60 percent of students get internships in companies like Infosys, startups, and local IT firms. The top roles offered are software engineer, web developer, and data analyst.
content.Infrastructure: The college offers good infrastructure with Wi-Fi-enabled classrooms, computer labs, and a library. The hostel is clean and safe. It has decent facilities and 24/7 security. Mess food is average but hygienic. Medical facilities and sports grounds are available, students can participate in various indoor and outdoor games.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: A good college to recommend.

content.Placements: RCEW placements are pretty good. They train us well, so we feel ready for interviews. Big companies like IBM and Accenture visit often. The average job salary is about 6.5 LPA, which is very good. If you want a good career scope, good placement at a good company, then RCEW is a smart choice.
content.Infrastructure: RCEW campus is safe and clean! We have pretty good labs with good Wi-Fi. The classrooms are quite big. Hostels are super clean, and they keep the whole area nice and green. It's a peaceful and secure place for studying and living. Perfect for girls.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: The college has very good placement with excellent skills.

content.Placements: There is a 100 percent placement in Computer Science Engineering. The lowest package is about 4 LPA, the average is about 8 LPA, and the highest is about 16 LPA. Flipkart, Genpact, Nokia, and many more good companies. We got around 85 to 95 percent internship.
content.Infrastructure: We have a nice campus, very good labs with proper internet connections. Good classrooms, badminton court, basketball court, etc. There is very good and healthy food in the hostel's mess. Medical facilities are also provided. Sports events are also organized, and there is almost 100 percent participation.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: A great college for women’s empowerment in technology.

content.Placements: The placement process at RCEW is quite active, especially for CSE students. Many companies like TCS, Capgemini, Infosys, Accenture, and Cognizant visit the campus. The average package is around 4–6 LPA. A few top students get higher offers from MNCs. The placement cell and training department conduct regular aptitude sessions, mock interviews, and coding tests to prepare students. Most students get placed if they are consistent with their skills, though getting a high-package job depends on individual performance.
content.Infrastructure: College infrastructure is good and well-maintained. Classrooms are clean and spacious. They are having projectors and Wi-Fi. Labs have all the required systems for software for coding and practical work. The library is peaceful with a good collection of books. The hostel is safe. It has basic facilities. The food quality in the mess can be improved.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: A good campus and environment for female students.

content.Placements: Rajasthan College of Engineering for Women provides a 100% placement to the student's admission. The highest package is 94 lacs. Many top companies visit the campus every year and place students in their company.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good and clean, a good environment and a lot of fresh air generated by the green very and plants. The hostel facility and environment are survival. The rooms are good, the mess food is average and sometimes good too. The canteen is available. We have a big sports ground.

faqs.answer:
Rajasthan College of Engineering for Women (RCEW) has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed Diploma in relevant stream from a recognised Institute.M.E./M.TechCandidates with qualifications obtained through examinations conducted by professional societies recognised by MHRD/UGC/AIU/UPSC/AICTE {e.g. AMIE by Institute of Engineers (India); AMICE by Institute of Civil Engineers (India); IEE} as equivalent to B.E./B.Tech. are also eligible.MBA/PGDMCandidate must have passed Bachelor degree of minimum 3 years duration.

reviews.review_heading: Good campus with average faculty.
reviews.review_text: The college offers good infrastructure with Wi-Fi-enabled classrooms, computer labs, and a library. The hostel is clean and safe. It has decent facilities and 24/7 security. Mess food is average but hygienic. Medical facilities and sports grounds are available, students can participate in various indoor and outdoor games.

reviews.review_heading: A good college to recommend.
reviews.review_text: RCEW campus is safe and clean! We have pretty good labs with good Wi-Fi. The classrooms are quite big. Hostels are super clean, and they keep the whole area nice and green. It's a peaceful and secure place for studying and living. Perfect for girls.

reviews.review_heading: The college has very good placement with excellent skills.
reviews.review_text: We have a nice campus, very good labs with proper internet connections. Good classrooms, badminton court, basketball court, etc. There is very good and healthy food in the hostel's mess. Medical facilities are also provided. Sports events are also organized, and there is almost 100 percent participation.

reviews.review_heading: A great college for women’s empowerment in technology.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is good and well-maintained. Classrooms are clean and spacious. They are having projectors and Wi-Fi. Labs have all the required systems for software for coding and practical work. The library is peaceful with a good collection of books. The hostel is safe. It has basic facilities. The food quality in the mess can be improved.

reviews.review_heading: A good campus and environment for female students.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good and clean, a good environment and a lot of fresh air generated by the green very and plants. The hostel facility and environment are survival. The rooms are good, the mess food is average and sometimes good too. The canteen is available. We have a big sports ground.

reviews.review_heading: RCEW: A college with great placements and encouraging women's education .
reviews.review_text: In the hostel, there are various types of rooms like attached rooms, no attached rooms with AC, rooms with AC double seaters, a single seater room, etc. The fee range varies from the room. The first two are not allowed to go out exploring anything alone but they can go out with the warden on the weekend. After 1st year in the 2nd, 3rd, and 4th years, you can get permission from your parents. If your parents give permission, you can go out.

reviews.review_heading: In my college, placements are good. Infrastructure and facilities are average.
reviews.review_text: The facilities have smart boards and star-type classes. Infrastructure available for my course/department is average. There are 5 labs. Library is also available in my college. The quality of facility in my hostel is average. The quality of food available in the mess is also average.

reviews.review_heading: The college is nice for girls and also secure for girls. Hostel is also good enough for girls.
reviews.review_text: Hostel is very nice. The washrooms are very neat and clean and we can live here. Hostel rooms are good enough for peaceful study. They also provide AC and attached toilets as well. The mess food is good and the lunch is very delicious. Quality of the food is good.

reviews.review_heading: Nice percentage of placements.
reviews.review_text: We have Wi-Fi connections (sometimes they do not work), different labs for different subjects, and nice classrooms. Libraries have a calm and comfortable environment to study. Even the hostel provides a study room. It has computers also. You are free to study anywhere.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members are really very good and many students got placed in our college.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure regarding the course and department are very good. There are proper labs for each subject. Classrooms are also neat and clean. There is a Wi-Fi facility where students can use unlimited Wi-Fi during their studies. Library facility is also very good where each book is available regarding your course.

reviews.review_heading: Good campus of college.
reviews.review_text: Rooms are clean and common area is consistently mentioned as a positive aspect, contributing to a comfortable living environment. Most reviewers raise the high-security measures in place, including CCTV cameras, a secure entry system, and strict guest policies.

reviews.review_heading: Really good college and can secure your bright future.
reviews.review_text: The hostel provides a feeling of home. It provides a secure, comfortable and healthy environment for all the students. The hostel mess provides oil-free food. Hostel students can enjoy an evening with sports and many other activities. The warden is very friendly and helpful.

reviews.review_heading: Great placements & safe campus for Women's Education.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available 24/7, and classrooms have smart and digital boards. All the faculty members are available for every subject and program. The mess food is very good compared to my past experiences. College also provides sports, like volleyball, basketball, kabaddi, table tennis, badminton, chess, and carrom.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members are very good and understanding. Placements are also good.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are very good and labs are okay. In the hostel, all facilities are available. The infrastructure is okay. The library is good. Sometimes, we face Wi-Fi problems due to network problems. The food available in the canteen is good.

reviews.review_heading: The highest placements, the best girls' college in Jaipur, and safe environment for girls.
reviews.review_text: The quality of food in the mess is good. The mess menu changes every week. The environment is green, safe, and beautiful. Medical facilities are available 24 hours. The canteen food is great. Sports facilities and a gym are available 24/7. Laundry service is available.

hostel_campus.college_name: JSPM’s Bhagwant Institute of Technology Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Don't take admission if you have another option; go for it without regret.
reviews.review_text: The college does not have Wi-Fi. The classrooms are average, and the food in the mess is not so good. The college does not take part in any sports activities and does not encourage the students to participate in sports activities. The quality of food is so bad. The boys' hostel is the worst place to live.

reviews.review_heading: Review of JSPM’s Bhagwant Institute of Technology.
reviews.review_text: In our college campuses, there is a girls' hostel and another is a boys' hostel, which is on campus. In the boys' hostel, all facilities are provided. Like clean water to drink, clean water to bathe, Wi-Fi, fans, separate bathrooms, etc. The quality in our hostel is good. Food is also good.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides a way towards success.
reviews.review_text: There is Wi-Fi available in our college but we do not get enough speed Wi-Fi. Labs are good but students do not practice properly. Library is awesome. But not regularly open because of some problems in the college. There are no sports activities conducted and the food served is not proper from MS.

reviews.review_heading: Don't take admission if you have another option.
reviews.review_text: There is no Wi-Fi in the college and the classrooms are not very good. The food is not good in the mess. There are no sports activities offered by the college. The teachers don't encourage the students for the sports activities, and the boys' hostel is so bad that it's hard to leave.

reviews.review_heading: Very satisfied because of the college and faculty. Good placements.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities are available and safety is there. All the facilities are there in our campus hostel. Safety is under the CCTVs. All the rules are strictly followed in the hostel for girls and boys. In our college, library is there for students. Our campus has Wi-Fi.

reviews.review_heading: In view of only education, the college is excellent but there is no campus selection here.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, labs and classrooms are all good. The Wi-Fi facility is available here. All labs are available in good condition. All equipment is available in good and working condition. Library is up to the mark as all desired books related to the subject are available in our library.

reviews.review_heading: All basic information you should know about BIT, Barshi.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is too good, there are all the needed facilities like Wi-Fi, library, and 2 canteens, medical facilities, and an ambulance for emergencies. Sports and games are also conducted. There is daily cleaning in hostels, and canteen hygiene is maintained.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Review of GATES Institute of Technology.

review_content.Placements: More than 50% of students in our batch are placed successfully. The highest package is 6 LPA, and the lowest package is 2.4 LPA. Top companies include Accenture, Cognizant, Chorizo, 24/7.ai, etc., and many students also got internship opportunities from institutions like GQT, G-Tech, etc. In my course, the top roles are data analyst, data scientist, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college is very well equipped with all the facilities, like the library, laboratories, digital classrooms, and Wi-Fi for every department. We have very friendly faculty and also a placement and training department for placement opportunities and training purposes.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Great campus life and learning.

review_content.Placements: I joined the course because it offers good and reliable jobs, and job opportunities tend to be quick after completing the course. Of course, it is tough, but once we understand what we need to do, we can secure qualified jobs. Many people are also joining this branch because there is high demand. My batch is good, and everyone is very energetic.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college's infrastructure is not that bad; they maintain it well. However, there are some problems. We get our needs met adequately. The hostel is good, with a special feature—nature surrounds it—so we get fresh air and enjoy the outdoors.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Decent infrastructure and supportive faculty, but placements affected by the recession.

review_content.Placements: Due to the recession, no students are placed directly this year. Instead, some are selected for internships based on company requirements. For now, the highest package is 6.5 LPA, but it falls around 3.5 to 6.5 LPA on average. Top recruiting companies are Infosys, TCS, Accenture, and Cognizant, mainly for sales-based roles. Around 10-15 students are selected for internships. Most selections are in training-based and startup companies. In my course, roles are Junior Data Analyst, and higher roles are offered with experience in the field.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-fi in the college is provided for students. Labs are good with more seats, in good condition, and have a speed internet connection system for students. In the library, you are provided with references like books and recent papers on your subjects. Sports events are also conducted for events.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Our college is good for all students.

review_content.Placements: In our college, there are more than 60 members like 66 members in our branch. In that, only 6 members got placed in our course. The highest package is 6 LPA, and the lowest package is 2.50 LPA. The top recruiting company of our college is Infosys, which is available only for girls. The percentage of students who got internships from my course is 30% in companies like Tap Academy, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure available for our course are labs, classrooms, and the library. The quality of the facilities in our hostel is average. The quality of food is average sometimes. The canteen maintenance is good. Medical facilities are available. It has sports like cricket, volleyball and kabaddi.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: It is the best college for engineering.

review_content.Placements: Mostly 80% of students get placed in our college. The highest package is 9 LPA and the lowest package is 2.4 LPA. Students get placed in top companies like Accenture, TCS, Infosys, Wipro, etc. Many students got internship offers from top MNCs and startup companies. They offered different roles like sales, testing field, software development, etc. TPO is good for giving placement training.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good. The internet facility is also available in our college. Labs and libraries are also good and high equipment allows to work students.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: The college has a good campus with clubs and societies.

review_content.Placements: Our college provides a lot of placements in companies like Capgemini, Wipro, Mindtree, Accenture, Cognizant, TCS, etc. Many students got placed in our college. This college provides placement training for better improvement of students and to perform well in placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college has hostels for both boys and girls. There is security regarding the hostel which helps girls to stay more safe. There is a Wi-Fi connection in all labs. In college, each floor has one Wi-Fi connection to help students with disturbances regarding internet connectivity. The college has modern laboratories, well-maintained classrooms, and Wi-Fi connectivity. The college has a digital library and a medium-sized library.

reviews.review_text: The college has hostels for both boys and girls. There is security regarding the hostel which helps girls to stay more safe. There is a Wi-Fi connection in all labs. In college, each floor has one Wi-Fi connection to help students with disturbances regarding internet connectivity. The college has modern laboratories, well-maintained classrooms, and Wi-Fi connectivity. The college has a digital library and a medium-sized library.

reviews.review_heading: Gate Institute of technology, Gooty.
reviews.review_text: It is cool. There is a nice view from the top of the college. The college is very green. It has a canteen for hill out to get free from the stress. We have campus life, sufficient labs, a library to read magazines, etc. Our college pushes students to overcome and participate in all activities.

reviews.review_heading: A review of Gate Institute of Technology.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure on campus are good, providing the best systems for learning at the library. The library is well-equipped with all the books and information needed. The hostel is good in terms of rooms and security, but the food is not great. Otherwise, everything is okay for students.

reviews.review_heading: Great infrastructure and facilities, but faculty members and placements could be better.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are spacious and well-maintained, equipped with projectors, whiteboards, air-conditioning, etc. Labs are available with the necessary equipment. Some labs need upgraded equipment, better maintenance, and more availability. Wi-Fi is available across campus. Library is well-stocked with books, journals, research papers, and e-resources.

reviews.review_heading: A good environment on campus with a lot of trees.
reviews.review_text: Hostel is accomplished with a good environment. Room is provided for 4 to 5 persons, it is spacious with a shelf of 3 rows to keep our things and a single cot to sleep in. Around 24 hours current and water is provided and free Wi-Fi is provided. The food is good compared to other colleges the taste is really better if compared. Hostel is located inside the campus for boys and for girls in Gooty with same facilities and powerful security.

reviews.review_heading: GATES institute of technology .
reviews.review_text: Our college has all the facilities, including labs with WiFi, clean classrooms, and experienced lecturers. The hostel provides quality food and Wi-Fi, and there's a water facility. The lab systems are always up to date. Our college were recently granted autonomous status.

reviews.review_heading: Review of GATES Institute of Technology.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good. CSE is the top branch of this college. Hostel facilities are decent. The food quality is great.

reviews.review_heading: My experience with this college .
reviews.review_text: The hostel infrastructure is good, but the senior rooms are not up to par. But compared to some other hostels, it is worth the money, and when it comes to food, it makes a big difference, like more masala and healthy and hygienic food that is good.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is good for the middle-class students.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is big. There are digital classrooms and good labs. The quality of the food is above average. Sports provided are above average. There is a large cricket playground behind the college. Bus facilities are provided for different villages and towns nearby.

reviews.review_heading: Overall I give 4 out of 5. Because management and infrastructure everything is fine.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is good. There are labs for machines. In our college library is also there. Overall the facilites are good. During the time of farewell they conducted sports and games for every branch. They give fair prizes also for the winning candidates.
